<div class="bm-help-page bm-help-page--tab">

    <div class="bm-help-header">
        <h1 class="bm-help-title">Filter syntax</h1>
        <p class="bm-help-lead">
            Every filter box in Batch Monitor speaks the same language.
            Type one or many terms, use operators to combine them, and prefix a
            term with a field name to narrow down where it looks.
        </p>
    </div>

    <!-- ── Combining terms ─────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <section class="bm-help-section">
        <h2>Combining terms</h2>

        <p>
            By default, terms separated by a <strong>space</strong> are ANDed together —
            every term must match. Use a <strong>comma</strong> to OR terms — any one must match.
        </p>

        <table class="bm-help-table">
            <thead><tr><th>Syntax</th><th>Meaning</th><th>Example</th></tr></thead>
            <tbody>
                <tr><td><code>a b</code> or <code>a &amp; b</code></td><td>AND — both must match</td><td><code>Loader Transform</code></td></tr>
                <tr><td><code>a , b</code> or <code>a | b</code></td><td>OR — either must match</td><td><code>Loader , Parser</code></td></tr>
                <tr><td><code>!a</code></td><td>NOT — must not match</td><td><code>!error</code></td></tr>
                <tr><td><code>(…)</code></td><td>group to control precedence</td><td><code>Loader (error , timeout)</code></td></tr>
            </tbody>
        </table>

        <div class="bm-help-callout">
            <strong>Precedence:</strong> NOT binds tightest, then AND (space), then OR (comma).
            So <code>car bike , plane dog</code> means <em>(car AND bike) OR (plane AND dog)</em>.
            Use parentheses when in doubt.
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- ── Text matching ───────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <section class="bm-help-section">
        <h2>Text matching</h2>

        <table class="bm-help-table">
            <thead><tr><th>Syntax</th><th>Meaning</th></tr></thead>
            <tbody>
                <tr>
                    <td><code>field:value</code></td>
                    <td>Case-insensitive <strong>contains</strong> — "Loader" matches "BatchLoader", "loaderMain", etc.</td>
                </tr>
                <tr>
                    <td><code>field:"Value"</code></td>
                    <td>Double quotes → case-<strong>sensitive</strong> contains</td>
                </tr>
                <tr>
                    <td><code>field:'value'</code></td>
                    <td>Single quotes → case-<strong>insensitive</strong> contains (same as no quotes)</td>
                </tr>
                <tr>
                    <td><code>field:Load*</code></td>
                    <td><strong>Glob</strong> — <code>*</code> matches any number of characters, <code>?</code> matches exactly one</td>
                </tr>
                <tr>
                    <td><code>field:=Value</code></td>
                    <td><strong>Exact</strong> match (whole value, case-insensitive). Wildcards not allowed here.</td>
                </tr>
                <tr>
                    <td><code>field:null</code></td>
                    <td>Field is <strong>null or missing</strong></td>
                </tr>
            </tbody>
        </table>

        <div class="bm-help-callout">
            <strong>Tip:</strong> a term with no <code>field:</code> prefix searches across
            <em>all</em> text fields in the current view. <code>Loader</code> alone will
            match any record where any searchable field contains "Loader".
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- ── Field-scoped groups ─────────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <section class="bm-help-section">
        <h2>Field-scoped groups</h2>
        <p>
            You can give several values for the same field using parentheses after the colon.
            Space inside the group means AND; comma means OR.
        </p>
        <table class="bm-help-table">
            <thead><tr><th>Example</th><th>Meaning</th></tr></thead>
            <tbody>
                <tr><td><code>svc:(Loader Transform)</code></td><td>service contains "Loader" AND "Transform"</td></tr>
                <tr><td><code>svc:(Loader , Transform)</code></td><td>service is "Loader" OR "Transform"</td></tr>
            </tbody>
        </table>
    </section>

    <!-- ── Comparisons ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <section class="bm-help-section">
        <h2>Comparisons &amp; ranges</h2>

        <p>Use comparison operators before the value for numeric and date fields.</p>

        <table class="bm-help-table">
            <thead><tr><th>Syntax</th><th>Meaning</th></tr></thead>
            <tbody>
                <tr><td><code>field:&gt;100</code></td><td>Greater than 100</td></tr>
                <tr><td><code>field:&gt;=100</code></td><td>Greater than or equal to 100</td></tr>
                <tr><td><code>field:&lt;100</code></td><td>Less than 100</td></tr>
                <tr><td><code>field:&lt;=100</code></td><td>Less than or equal to 100</td></tr>
                <tr><td><code>field:10..50</code></td><td>Between 10 and 50 <strong>inclusive</strong></td></tr>
            </tbody>
        </table>
    </section>

    <!-- ── Dates ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <section class="bm-help-section">
        <h2>Dates &amp; times</h2>

        <p>All date/time values are interpreted as UTC.</p>

        <table class="bm-help-table">
            <thead><tr><th>Form</th><th>Example</th><th>Meaning</th></tr></thead>
            <tbody>
                <tr><td>Named</td><td><code>today</code>, <code>yesterday</code>, <code>now</code></td><td>Start of today / yesterday / current instant (UTC)</td></tr>
                <tr><td>Negative offset</td><td><code>-7d</code>, <code>-2h</code>, <code>-30m</code>, <code>-1w</code></td><td><strong>now − N</strong> — a real point in the past (e.g. for timestamps)</td></tr>
                <tr><td>Positive offset</td><td><code>7d</code>, <code>2h</code>, <code>30m</code>, <code>1w</code></td><td><strong>today + N</strong> — midnight plus the interval (e.g. for age/duration fields)</td></tr>
                <tr><td>Absolute date</td><td><code>2024-06-15</code></td><td>Midnight UTC on that date</td></tr>
                <tr><td>Absolute datetime</td><td><code>2024-06-15T09:30</code></td><td>Specific UTC date and time</td></tr>
                <tr><td>Time / duration</td><td><code>09:30</code>, <code>00:10:00</code></td><td><strong>today + hh:mm:ss</strong> — works as a clock time or as a duration depending on the field</td></tr>
            </tbody>
        </table>

        <p>Combine with comparison operators or <code>..</code> ranges:</p>
        <div class="bm-help-examples">
            <div class="bm-help-ex"><code>start:&gt;-7d</code> <span>— started in the last 7 days (now − 7d)</span></div>
            <div class="bm-help-ex"><code>start:2024-01-01..2024-12-31</code> <span>— started in 2024</span></div>
            <div class="bm-help-ex"><code>start:&gt;=09:00 start:&lt;17:00</code> <span>— started during business hours today</span></div>
        </div>

        <div class="bm-help-callout" style="margin-top:14px;">
            <strong>Negative vs positive offsets:</strong> <code>-10m</code> means <em>now minus 10 minutes</em> — useful for real
            timestamps like <code>start</code> or <code>finish</code>.  <code>10m</code> (no minus) means <em>today at 00:10:00</em> —
            useful for age/duration fields stored as elapsed time from midnight, like <code>dur</code> or <code>updated</code>.
            <code>hh:mm</code> always means <em>today + that time</em>, so <code>00:10</code> and <code>10m</code> are identical.
        </div>

        <p style="margin-top:14px;">Duration fields (<code>dur</code>) store elapsed time as today + interval, so use positive offsets or <code>hh:mm</code>:</p>
        <div class="bm-help-examples">
            <div class="bm-help-ex"><code>dur:&gt;00:01</code>      <span>— longer than 1 minute</span></div>
            <div class="bm-help-ex"><code>dur:&gt;01:00</code>      <span>— longer than 1 hour</span></div>
            <div class="bm-help-ex"><code>dur:00:30..02:00</code>  <span>— between 30 min and 2 hours</span></div>
            <div class="bm-help-ex"><code>dur:&lt;00:00:30</code>   <span>— under 30 seconds</span></div>
        </div>
        <p style="margin-top:14px;">Real timestamp fields (<code>start</code>, <code>finish</code>, <code>updated</code>) use negative offsets:</p>
        <div class="bm-help-examples">
            <div class="bm-help-ex"><code>updated:&gt;-10m</code>   <span>— heartbeat received in the last 10 min (online)</span></div>
            <div class="bm-help-ex"><code>updated:&lt;-4m</code>    <span>— last heartbeat more than 4 min ago (stale)</span></div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- ── Timeline fields ─────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <section class="bm-help-section">
        <h2>Timeline fields</h2>
        <p>Use either the short alias or the full name — they are interchangeable.</p>

        <table class="bm-help-table bm-help-table--fields">
            <thead><tr><th>Alias</th><th>Full name</th><th>Description</th></tr></thead>
            <tbody>
                <tr><td><code>svc</code></td><td><code>service</code></td><td>Service name</td></tr>
                <tr><td><code>pipe</code></td><td><code>pipeline</code></td><td>Pipeline name</td></tr>
                <tr><td><code>src</code></td><td><code>source</code></td><td>Source identifier</td></tr>
                <tr><td><code>chunk</code></td><td><code>chunkId</code></td><td>Chunk ID</td></tr>
                <tr><td><code>srv</code></td><td><code>server</code></td><td>Server / host name</td></tr>
                <tr><td><code>pid</code></td><td><code>processId</code></td><td>Process ID</td></tr>
                <tr><td><code>dur</code></td><td><code>duration</code></td><td>Event duration — use <code>hh:mm</code> or <code>hh:mm:ss</code></td></tr>
                <tr><td><code>start</code></td><td><code>startUtc</code></td><td>Event start time (UTC)</td></tr>
                <tr><td><code>finish</code></td><td><code>finishUtc</code></td><td>Event finish time (UTC)</td></tr>
            </tbody>
        </table>
    </section>

    <!-- ── Run list fields ───────────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <section class="bm-help-section">
        <h2>Run list fields</h2>

        <table class="bm-help-table bm-help-table--fields">
            <thead><tr><th>Alias</th><th>Full name</th><th>Description</th></tr></thead>
            <tbody>
                <tr><td><code>run / runid</code></td><td><code>RunId</code></td><td>Run identifier</td></tr>
                <tr><td><code>name</code></td><td><code>Name</code></td><td>Run name</td></tr>
                <tr><td><code>type</code></td><td><code>Type</code></td><td>Run type</td></tr>
                <tr><td><code>status</code></td><td><code>Status</code></td><td>Running / Completed / Failed / …</td></tr>
            </tbody>
        </table>
    </section>

    <!-- ── Services fields ───────────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <section class="bm-help-section">
        <h2>Services fields</h2>

        <table class="bm-help-table bm-help-table--fields">
            <thead><tr><th>Alias</th><th>Full name</th><th>Description</th></tr></thead>
            <tbody>
                <tr><td><code>svcname / servicename</code></td><td><code>ServiceName</code></td><td>Service name</td></tr>
                <tr><td><code>host / hostname</code></td><td><code>HostName</code></td><td>Host name</td></tr>
                <tr><td><code>pid / processid</code></td><td><code>ProcessId</code></td><td>Process ID</td></tr>
                <tr><td><code>ram / mem</code></td><td><code>RamMb</code></td><td>Current RAM usage in MB — use numeric comparisons</td></tr>
                <tr><td><code>peak</code></td><td><code>PeakMb</code></td><td>Peak RAM usage in MB</td></tr>
                <tr><td><code>updated</code></td><td><code>UpdatedDateTime</code></td><td>Last heartbeat timestamp — use negative offsets (e.g. <code>updated:&gt;-10m</code>)</td></tr>
            </tbody>
        </table>

        <div class="bm-help-examples">
            <div class="bm-help-ex"><code>updated:&gt;-10m</code>  <span>— heartbeat in the last 10 minutes (online)</span></div>
            <div class="bm-help-ex"><code>updated:&lt;-4m</code>   <span>— last heartbeat more than 4 minutes ago (stale)</span></div>
            <div class="bm-help-ex"><code>ram:&gt;500</code>        <span>— services using more than 500 MB</span></div>
            <div class="bm-help-ex"><code>host:server1</code>    <span>— services running on server1</span></div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- ── Examples ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <section class="bm-help-section">
        <h2>Examples</h2>

        <div class="bm-help-examples">
            <div class="bm-help-ex"><code>Loader</code>
                <span>— any event whose service, pipeline, source, chunk, or server contains "Loader"</span></div>
            <div class="bm-help-ex"><code>svc:Loader</code>
                <span>— service contains "Loader" (case-insensitive)</span></div>
            <div class="bm-help-ex"><code>svc:"Loader"</code>
                <span>— service contains "Loader" (case-sensitive)</span></div>
            <div class="bm-help-ex"><code>svc:=Loader</code>
                <span>— service is exactly "Loader"</span></div>
            <div class="bm-help-ex"><code>svc:Load*</code>
                <span>— service starts with "Load" (glob)</span></div>
            <div class="bm-help-ex"><code>svc:Loader !error</code>
                <span>— service contains "Loader" AND no field contains "error"</span></div>
            <div class="bm-help-ex"><code>svc:(Loader , Parser)</code>
                <span>— service is "Loader" or "Parser"</span></div>
            <div class="bm-help-ex"><code>dur:&gt;00:01</code>
                <span>— events that took more than 1 minute</span></div>
            <div class="bm-help-ex"><code>dur:00:30..02:00</code>
                <span>— events between 30 min and 2 hours</span></div>
            <div class="bm-help-ex"><code>pipe:null</code>
                <span>— events with no pipeline assigned</span></div>
            <div class="bm-help-ex"><code>start:&gt;-1h</code>
                <span>— events that started in the last hour</span></div>
            <div class="bm-help-ex"><code>start:&gt;=09:00 start:&lt;17:00</code>
                <span>— events that started during business hours today (UTC)</span></div>
            <div class="bm-help-ex"><code>svc:Loader start:&gt;-1h dur:&gt;00:01</code>
                <span>— Loader events from the last hour that took more than 1 minute</span></div>
        </div>
    </section>

</div>

                                @n.Role
                            </span>
                        </div>

                        Connecting…
                    </div>

            </div>

@code {
    // Batch state
    private List<RunSummary> _recent = new();

    // Health state
    private KafkaHealth? _kafkaHealth   = null;
    private MongoHealth? _mongoHealth   = null;
    private bool         _kafkaChecking = false;
    private bool         _mongoChecking = false;

    private CancellationTokenSource _cts = new();

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        EnvService.OnChange += OnEnvExternalChange;
        await Task.WhenAll(LoadRunsAsync(), CheckHealthAsync());
        _ = PollHealthAsync();
    }

    // ── Batch ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task LoadRunsAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            var batches = await RunService.GetRunsAsync(EnvService.SelectedId, DateTime.UtcNow, 5);
            _recent = batches.Take(5).ToList();
        }
        catch { /* non-critical */ }
    }

    // ── Health ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task CheckHealthAsync()
    {
        _kafkaChecking = true;
        _mongoChecking = true;
        await InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged);

        var env = EnvService.SelectedId;
        var kafkaTask = HealthService.CheckKafkaAsync(env, _cts.Token);
        var mongoTask = HealthService.CheckMongoAsync(env, _cts.Token);

        try
        {
            _kafkaHealth   = await kafkaTask;
            _kafkaChecking = false;
            await InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged);
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) { return; }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            _kafkaHealth   = new KafkaHealth { Status = HealthStatus.Down, CheckedAt = DateTime.UtcNow, Error = ex.Message };
            _kafkaChecking = false;
        }

        try
        {
            _mongoHealth   = await mongoTask;
            _mongoChecking = false;
            await InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged);
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) { return; }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            _mongoHealth   = new MongoHealth { Status = HealthStatus.Down, CheckedAt = DateTime.UtcNow, Error = ex.Message };
            _mongoChecking = false;
        }

        await InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged);
    }

    private async Task PollHealthAsync()
    {
        while (!_cts.IsCancellationRequested)
        {
            try { await Task.Delay(10_000, _cts.Token); }
            catch (OperationCanceledException) { return; }
            await CheckHealthAsync();
        }
    }

    // ── Env change ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async void OnEnvExternalChange()
    {
        await Task.WhenAll(LoadRunsAsync(), CheckHealthAsync());
        await InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged);
    }

    private async Task OnEnvChanged(string newId)
    {
        EnvService.SelectedId = newId;
        await Task.WhenAll(LoadRunsAsync(), CheckHealthAsync());
    }

    // ── Navigation ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private void OpenRunsDashboard() =>
        TabService.OpenOrFocus(TabModel.CreateRunsDashboard(EnvService.SelectedId));

    private void OpenDetail(RunSummary b) =>
        TabService.OpenOrFocus(TabModel.CreateRunDetail(b.RunId, b.Name, EnvService.SelectedId));

    // ── Helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private static string StatusCss(HealthStatus? s) => s switch
    {
        HealthStatus.Healthy  => "healthy",
        HealthStatus.Degraded => "degraded",
        HealthStatus.Down     => "down",
        HealthStatus.Checking => "checking",
        _                     => "unknown",
    };

    private static string FormatDuration(TimeSpan ts) =>
        ts.TotalHours >= 1
            ? $"{(int)ts.TotalHours:D2}:{ts.Minutes:D2}:{ts.Seconds:D2}"
            : $"{ts.Minutes:D2}:{ts.Seconds:D2}";

    public void Dispose()
    {
        EnvService.OnChange -= OnEnvExternalChange;
        _cts.Cancel();
    }
}
FILE src/NxtUI.Web/Pages/HomeMemoryTreemap.razor
LENGTH 3394
@using NxtUI.Core.Services
@using NxtUI.Core.Models
@inject IHeartbeatService HeartbeatSvc
@inject IServiceMetricsMonitor MetricsMonitor
@inject TabService TabService
@inject IJSRuntime JS
@implements IAsyncDisposable

<div class="bm-home-treemap-wrap">
    @if (_loading)
    {
        <div class="bm-treemap-loading">
            <div class="bm-treemap-spinner"></div>
            <span class="bm-treemap-loading-label">Loading memory data…</span>
        </div>
    }
    <div class="bm-home-treemap" @ref="_ref" @onclick="OpenServices"
         style="@(_loading ? "visibility:hidden" : "")"></div>
</div>

@code {
    [Parameter] public string Env { get; set; } = string.Empty;

    private ElementReference _ref;
    private IDisposable?     _sub;
    private bool             _dirty;
    private bool             _loading = true;
    private TreeRoot?        _treeData;

    private sealed record TreeRoot(string Name, List<TreeHost> Children);
    private sealed record TreeHost(string Name, List<TreeSvc>  Children);
    private sealed record TreeSvc (string Name, int Pid, double? Ram);

    protected override void OnInitialized()
    {
        _sub = MetricsMonitor.Subscribe(Env);
        MetricsMonitor.OnMetricsUpdated += OnMetricsUpdated;
    }

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        await LoadAsync();
        await InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged);
    }

    protected override async Task OnAfterRenderAsync(bool firstRender)
    {
        if (!_dirty) return;
        _dirty = false;
        await RenderAsync();
    }

    private void OnMetricsUpdated(string env)
    {
        if (env != Env) return;
        _ = InvokeAsync(async () => { await LoadAsync(); StateHasChanged(); });
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            var services = await HeartbeatSvc.GetServiceStatusesAsync(Env);

            var hosts = services
                .Where(s => s.IsOnline)
                .GroupBy(s => s.HostName)
                .Select(g =>
                {
                    var svcs = g.Select(s =>
                    {
                        var m   = MetricsMonitor.GetLatest(Env, s);
                        double? ram = m != null ? m.CurrentUsageBytes / 1_048_576.0 : null;
                        return new TreeSvc(s.ServiceName, s.ProcessId, ram);
                    }).ToList();
                    return new TreeHost(g.Key, svcs);
                }).ToList();

            _treeData = hosts.Count > 0 ? new TreeRoot("root", hosts) : null;
        }
        catch { _treeData = null; }

        _dirty = true;
    }

    private async Task RenderAsync()
    {
        if (_treeData is null) return;
        try
        {
            await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("homeMemoryTreemap.render", _ref, _treeData);
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            Console.Error.WriteLine($"[HomeMemoryTreemap] JS error: {ex.Message}");
        }
        finally
        {
            if (_loading) { _loading = false; StateHasChanged(); }
        }
    }

    private void OpenServices() =>
        TabService.OpenOrFocus(TabModel.CreateServicesDashboard(Env));

    public async ValueTask DisposeAsync()
    {
        MetricsMonitor.OnMetricsUpdated -= OnMetricsUpdated;
        _sub?.Dispose();
        try { await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("homeMemoryTreemap.destroy", _ref); } catch { }
    }
}

@code {
    private enum KafkaView { Topics, Consumers }

    [Parameter] public string Environment { get; set; } = string.Empty;

    // Shared
    private KafkaClusterInfo? _cluster  = null;
    private KafkaView         _viewMode = KafkaView.Topics;
    private bool              _loading  = true;
    private string            _filterText       = string.Empty;
    private string?           _filterParseError = null;
    private CancellationTokenSource _cts = new();

    // Topics
    private List<KafkaTopicSummary> _allTopics      = new();
    private List<KafkaTopicSummary> _filteredTopics = new();
    private List<KafkaTopicSummary> _paged          = new();
    private int _page = 1, _pageSize = 25, _totalPages = 1;

    // Consumers
    private List<KafkaConsumerGroupOverview> _allGroups      = new();
    private List<KafkaConsumerGroupOverview> _filteredGroups = new();
    private KafkaConsumerGroupOverview?      _selectedGroup  = null;
    private List<KafkaGroupTopicLag>?        _topicLags      = null;
    private bool _loadingDetail = false;

    // Filter parsers
    private static readonly FilterParser TopicParser = new(["Name", "CleanupPolicy"],
        new Dictionary<string, string>
        {
            ["name"]    = "Name",
            ["topic"]   = "Name",
            ["cleanup"] = "CleanupPolicy",
            ["policy"]  = "CleanupPolicy",
        });

    private static readonly FilterParser GroupParser = new(["GroupId", "State"],
        new Dictionary<string, string>
        {
            ["group"]   = "GroupId",
            ["groupid"] = "GroupId",
            ["state"]   = "State",
        });

    private static readonly (string Aliases, string Label)[] _topicFieldHints =
    [
        ("name / topic",     "topic name"),
        ("cleanup / policy", "cleanup policy (delete / compact)"),
    ];

    private static readonly (string Aliases, string Label)[] _groupFieldHints =
    [
        ("group / groupid", "consumer group ID"),
        ("state",           "Stable / Rebalancing / Dead / Empty"),
    ];

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync() => await LoadAsync();

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        _loading = true;
        StateHasChanged();
        try
        {
            if (_viewMode == KafkaView.Topics)
            {
                var t1 = KafkaSvc.GetClusterInfoAsync(Environment, _cts.Token);
                var t2 = KafkaSvc.GetTopicsAsync(Environment, _cts.Token);
                await Task.WhenAll(t1, t2);
                _cluster   = t1.Result;
                _allTopics = t2.Result.ToList();
            }
            else
            {
                var t1 = KafkaSvc.GetClusterInfoAsync(Environment, _cts.Token);
                var t2 = KafkaSvc.GetAllConsumerGroupsAsync(Environment, _cts.Token);
                await Task.WhenAll(t1, t2);
                _cluster       = t1.Result;
                _allGroups     = t2.Result.ToList();
                _selectedGroup = null;
                _topicLags     = null;
            }
            ApplyFilter();
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) { }
        finally { _loading = false; }
    }

    private void SwitchView(KafkaView view)
    {
        if (_viewMode == view) return;
        _viewMode         = view;
        _filterText       = string.Empty;
        _filterParseError = null;
        _selectedGroup    = null;
        _topicLags        = null;
        _ = LoadAsync();
    }

    private void OnFilterChanged(string text)
    {
        _filterText       = text;
        _filterParseError = null;
        FilterNode? node  = null;
        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(text))
        {
            try
            {
                node = (_viewMode == KafkaView.Topics ? TopicParser : GroupParser).Parse(text);
            }
            catch (FilterParseException ex) { _filterParseError = ex.Message; }
        }

        if (_viewMode == KafkaView.Topics)
        {
            _filteredTopics = node is null
                ? _allTopics
                : _allTopics.Where(t => FilterEvaluator.Evaluate(node, t)).ToList();
            _page = 1;
            RebuildPage();
        }
        else
        {
            _filteredGroups = node is null
                ? _allGroups
                : _allGroups.Where(g => FilterEvaluator.Evaluate(node, g)).ToList();
        }
    }

    private void ApplyFilter() => OnFilterChanged(_filterText);

    private void RebuildPage()
    {
        _totalPages = Math.Max(1, (int)Math.Ceiling(_filteredTopics.Count / (double)_pageSize));
        _page       = Math.Clamp(_page, 1, _totalPages);
        _paged      = _filteredTopics.Skip((_page - 1) * _pageSize).Take(_pageSize).ToList();
    }

    private void OnPageChanged(int page)   { _page = page;  RebuildPage(); }
    private void OnPageSizeChanged(int sz) { _pageSize = sz; _page = 1; RebuildPage(); }

    private async void OnGroupSelected(KafkaConsumerGroupOverview? group)
    {
        if (group is null || ReferenceEquals(_selectedGroup, group))
        {
            _selectedGroup = null;
            _topicLags     = null;
            StateHasChanged();
            return;
        }
        _selectedGroup = group;
        _topicLags     = null;
        _loadingDetail = true;
        StateHasChanged();
        try
        {
            var lags   = await KafkaSvc.GetGroupTopicLagsAsync(Environment, group.GroupId, _cts.Token);
            _topicLags = lags.ToList();
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) { }
        finally { _loadingDetail = false; StateHasChanged(); }
    }

    private async Task<bool> ConfirmAsync(string message, string confirmText = "Delete")
    {
        var dialog = await DialogService.ShowAsync<ConfirmDialog>("Confirm", new DialogParameters<ConfirmDialog>
        {
            { x => x.Message,     message     },
            { x => x.ConfirmText, confirmText },
        }, new DialogOptions { MaxWidth = MaxWidth.ExtraSmall });
        var result = await dialog.Result;
        return result is { Canceled: false };
    }

    private async Task DeleteTopicAsync(string topicName)
    {
        if (!await ConfirmAsync($"Delete topic \"{topicName}\"? This permanently removes all messages and cannot be undone.")) return;
        try
        {
            await KafkaSvc.DeleteTopicAsync(Environment, topicName, _cts.Token);
            Snackbar.Add($"Topic \"{topicName}\" deleted.", Severity.Success);
        }
        catch
        {
            try
            {
                await KafkaSvc.SetTopicRetentionAsync(Environment, topicName, 1, _cts.Token);
                Snackbar.Add($"Could not delete \"{topicName}\" — retention set to 1 ms (messages will expire shortly).", Severity.Warning);
            }
            catch
            {
                Snackbar.Add($"Failed to delete or clear topic \"{topicName}\".", Severity.Error);
                return;
            }
        }
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private async Task DeleteConsumerGroupAsync(string groupId)
    {
        if (!await ConfirmAsync($"Delete consumer group \"{groupId}\"? Offsets for this group will be lost.")) return;
        try
        {
            await KafkaSvc.DeleteConsumerGroupAsync(Environment, groupId, _cts.Token);
            if (_selectedGroup?.GroupId == groupId) { _selectedGroup = null; _topicLags = null; }
            Snackbar.Add($"Consumer group \"{groupId}\" deleted.", Severity.Success);
        }
        catch
        {
            Snackbar.Add($"Failed to delete consumer group \"{groupId}\".", Severity.Error);
            return;
        }
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private async Task OpenInfoDialog(string topicName)
    {
        var p = new DialogParameters<KafkaTopicInfoDialog>
        {
            { x => x.TopicName,   topicName   },
            { x => x.Environment, Environment },
        };
        await DialogService.ShowAsync<KafkaTopicInfoDialog>($"{topicName} — config", p,
            new DialogOptions { MaxWidth = MaxWidth.Small, FullWidth = true, CloseButton = true });
    }

    private async Task OpenGroupsDialog(string topicName)
    {
        var p = new DialogParameters<KafkaConsumerGroupsDialog>
        {
            { x => x.TopicName,   topicName   },
            { x => x.Environment, Environment },
        };
        await DialogService.ShowAsync<KafkaConsumerGroupsDialog>($"{topicName} — consumer groups", p,
            new DialogOptions { MaxWidth = MaxWidth.Small, FullWidth = true, CloseButton = true });
    }

    private void OpenInspector(string topicName)
        => TabService.OpenOrFocus(TabModel.CreateKafkaTopicInspector(topicName, Environment));

    private static string FormatMessages(KafkaTopicSummary t)
    {
        var prefix = t.CleanupPolicy.Contains("compact") ? "~" : "";
        return prefix + t.MessageCount.ToString("N0");
    }

    private static Color StateColor(string state) => state switch
    {
        "Stable"      => Color.Success,
        "Rebalancing" => Color.Warning,
        "Dead"        => Color.Error,
        _             => Color.Default,
    };

    public void Dispose() => _cts.Cancel();
}
FILE src/NxtUI.Web/Pages/KafkaGroupsDashboard.razor
LENGTH 9633
@using NxtUI.Core.Models
@using NxtUI.Core.Services
@using NxtUI.Filtering
@inject IKafkaService KafkaSvc
@implements IDisposable

<div class="bm-page bm-page-fill bm-inspector">

    <!-- Toolbar -->
    <div class="bm-batch-toolbar">
        <FilterBox Value="@_filterText"
                   OnFilterChanged="OnFilterChanged"
                   ParseError="@_filterParseError"
                   Placeholder="Filter consumer groups…"
                   Class="bm-filter-input"
                   FieldHints="@_fieldHints" />

        <MudTooltip Text="Refresh">
            <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Refresh"
                           Size="Size.Small"
                           Disabled="_loading"
                           OnClick="LoadAsync"
                           Class="bm-refresh-btn" />
        </MudTooltip>
    </div>

    <!-- Table -->
    <div class="bm-table-wrap @(_selected is not null ? "bm-inspector-split-top" : "")">
        @if (_loading)
        {
            <MudProgressLinear Indeterminate="true" Color="Color.Primary" Class="bm-loading-bar" />
        }

        <MudTable T="KafkaConsumerGroupOverview"
                  Items="_filtered"
                  Dense="true"
                  Hover="true"
                  Elevation="0"
                  FixedHeader="true"
                  Height="100%"
                  SelectedItem="_selected"
                  SelectedItemChanged="OnRowSelected"
                  Class="bm-batch-table">
            <HeaderContent>
                <MudTh>
                    <MudTableSortLabel T="KafkaConsumerGroupOverview" SortBy="x => x.GroupId">Group ID</MudTableSortLabel>
                </MudTh>
                <MudTh Style="width:120px;">
                    <MudTableSortLabel T="KafkaConsumerGroupOverview" SortBy="x => x.State">State</MudTableSortLabel>
                </MudTh>
                <MudTh Style="width:90px; text-align:right;">
                    <MudTableSortLabel T="KafkaConsumerGroupOverview" SortBy="x => x.TopicCount">Topics</MudTableSortLabel>
                </MudTh>
                <MudTh Style="width:110px; text-align:right;">
                    <MudTableSortLabel T="KafkaConsumerGroupOverview" SortBy="x => x.TotalLag">Total Lag</MudTableSortLabel>
                </MudTh>
            </HeaderContent>
            <RowTemplate>
                <MudTd @ondblclick="@(() => OnRowSelected(context))">
                    <span class="bm-kafka-mono bm-kafka-group-id-main">@context.GroupId</span>
                </MudTd>
                <MudTd @ondblclick="@(() => OnRowSelected(context))">
                    <MudChip T="string" Size="Size.Small" Variant="Variant.Text"
                             Color="@StateColor(context.State)">@context.State</MudChip>
                </MudTd>
                <MudTd Style="text-align:right;" @ondblclick="@(() => OnRowSelected(context))">
                    @context.TopicCount
                </MudTd>
                <MudTd Style="text-align:right;" @ondblclick="@(() => OnRowSelected(context))">
                    @if (context.TotalLag > 0)
                    {
                        <span class="bm-kafka-lag-warn">
                            @context.TotalLag.ToString("N0")
                            <MudIcon Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Warning"
                                     Size="Size.Small" Class="bm-kafka-lag-icon" />
                        </span>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <span class="bm-kafka-mono">0</span>
                    }
                </MudTd>
            </RowTemplate>
        </MudTable>
    </div>

    <!-- Detail panel -->
    @if (_selected is not null)
    {
        <div class="bm-inspector-detail">
            <div class="bm-inspector-detail-header">
                <span class="bm-kafka-mono">
                    <strong>@_selected.GroupId</strong>
                    &nbsp;·&nbsp; @_selected.State
                    &nbsp;·&nbsp; @_selected.TopicCount topic@(_selected.TopicCount == 1 ? "" : "s")
                </span>
                <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Close"
                               Size="Size.Small"
                               OnClick="@(() => { _selected = null; _topicLags = null; })" />
            </div>
            <div class="bm-inspector-detail-body">
                @if (_loadingDetail)
                {
                    <MudProgressLinear Indeterminate="true" Color="Color.Primary" />
                }
                else if (_topicLags is not null)
                {
                    <div class="bm-inspector-section-label">Subscribed topics</div>
                    <table class="bm-kafka-info-table" style="width:100%;">
                        <thead>
                            <tr>
                                <th>Topic</th>
                                <th style="text-align:right; width:80px;">Parts</th>
                                <th style="text-align:right; width:100px;">Lag</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody>
                            @foreach (var t in _topicLags)
                            {
                                <tr>
                                    <td class="bm-kafka-topic-name">@t.TopicName</td>
                                    <td style="text-align:right;" class="bm-kafka-mono">@t.Partitions</td>
                                    <td style="text-align:right;" class="@(t.Lag > 0 ? "bm-kafka-lag-warn" : "bm-kafka-mono")">

                                        @if (t.Lag > 0)
                                        {
                                            <MudIcon Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Warning"
                                                     Size="Size.Small" Class="bm-kafka-lag-icon" />
                                        }
                                    </td>
                                </tr>
                            }
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                }

        </div>

@code {
    [Parameter] public string Environment { get; set; } = string.Empty;

    private List<KafkaConsumerGroupOverview>  _all      = new();
    private List<KafkaConsumerGroupOverview>  _filtered = new();
    private KafkaConsumerGroupOverview?       _selected = null;
    private List<KafkaGroupTopicLag>?         _topicLags    = null;
    private bool _loading = true, _loadingDetail = false;
    private string  _filterText       = string.Empty;
    private string? _filterParseError = null;
    private CancellationTokenSource _cts = new();

    private static readonly string[] SearchableFields = ["GroupId", "State"];
    private static readonly FilterParser Parser = new(SearchableFields,
        new Dictionary<string, string>
        {
            ["group"]   = "GroupId",
            ["groupid"] = "GroupId",
            ["state"]   = "State",
        });

    private static readonly (string Aliases, string Label)[] _fieldHints =
    [
        ("group / groupid", "consumer group ID"),
        ("state",           "Stable / Rebalancing / Dead / Empty"),
    ];

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync() => await LoadAsync();

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        _loading = true;
        _selected = null;
        _topicLags = null;
        StateHasChanged();
        try
        {
            var groups = await KafkaSvc.GetAllConsumerGroupsAsync(Environment, _cts.Token);
            _all = groups.ToList();
            ApplyFilter();
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) { }
        finally { _loading = false; }
    }

    private void OnFilterChanged(string text)
    {
        _filterText = text;
        _filterParseError = null;
        FilterNode? node = null;
        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(text))
        {
            try   { node = Parser.Parse(text); }
            catch (FilterParseException ex) { _filterParseError = ex.Message; }
        }
        _filtered = node is null
            ? _all
            : _all.Where(g => FilterEvaluator.Evaluate(node, g)).ToList();
    }

    private void ApplyFilter() => OnFilterChanged(_filterText);

    private async void OnRowSelected(KafkaConsumerGroupOverview? group)
    {
        if (group is null || ReferenceEquals(_selected, group))
        {
            _selected  = null;
            _topicLags = null;
            StateHasChanged();
            return;
        }
        _selected      = group;
        _topicLags     = null;
        _loadingDetail = true;
        StateHasChanged();
        try
        {
            var lags   = await KafkaSvc.GetGroupTopicLagsAsync(Environment, group.GroupId, _cts.Token);
            _topicLags = lags.ToList();
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) { }
        finally { _loadingDetail = false; StateHasChanged(); }
    }

    private static Color StateColor(string state) => state switch
    {
        "Stable"      => Color.Success,
        "Rebalancing" => Color.Warning,
        "Dead"        => Color.Error,
        "Empty"       => Color.Default,
        _             => Color.Default,
    };

    public void Dispose() => _cts.Cancel();
}

@using NxtUI.Core.Models
@using NxtUI.Core.Services

@inject IKafkaService KafkaSvc
@inject IJSRuntime JS
@implements IDisposable

<div class="bm-page bm-page-fill bm-inspector">

    <!-- Toolbar -->
    <div class="bm-batch-toolbar">
        <span class="bm-inspector-topic">
            <MudIcon Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.MoveToInbox" Size="Size.Small" Class="bm-inspector-topic-icon" />
            @TopicName
        </span>

        <MudTooltip Text="@(_running ? "Pause" : "Resume")">

                           Size="Size.Small"
                           Color="@(_running ? Color.Warning : Color.Success)"
                           OnClick="ToggleRunning" />

                           Size="Size.Small"
                           OnClick="Restart" />

        <MudTooltip Text="Clear messages">

        <FilterBox Value="@_filterText"
                   OnFilterChanged="OnFilterChanged"

            <HeaderContent>
                <MudTh Style="width:90px;">Offset</MudTh>
                <MudTh Style="width:55px;">Part</MudTh>

                <MudTd @ondblclick="@(() => DownloadMessageAsync(context))">
                    <span class="bm-kafka-mono">@context.Offset</span>
                </MudTd>
                <MudTd @ondblclick="@(() => DownloadMessageAsync(context))">
                    <span class="bm-kafka-mono">@context.Partition</span>
                </MudTd>

                    &nbsp;·&nbsp; @_selected.Timestamp.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.fff") UTC
                </span>
                <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:4px;">
                    <MudTooltip Text="Save as JSON">
                        <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.SaveAlt"
                                       Size="Size.Small"
                                       OnClick="@(() => DownloadMessageAsync(_selected))" />
                    </MudTooltip>
                    <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Close"
                                   Size="Size.Small"
                                   OnClick="@(() => _selected = null)" />
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="bm-inspector-detail-body">
                @if (_selected.Headers.Count > 0)
                {
                    <div class="bm-inspector-section-label">Headers</div>
                    <div class="bm-inspector-headers">
                        @foreach (var h in _selected.Headers)
                        {
                            <span class="bm-inspector-header-key">@h.Key</span>
                            <span class="bm-kafka-mono bm-inspector-header-val">@h.Value</span>

                    </div>

                <div class="bm-inspector-section-label">Value</div>
                <pre class="bm-inspector-value">@FormatJson(_selected.Value)</pre>
            </div>

@code {
    [Parameter] public string TopicName   { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    [Parameter] public string Environment { get; set; } = string.Empty;

    private List<KafkaMessage> _messages    = new();
    private List<KafkaMessage> _filtered    = new();
    private KafkaMessage?      _selected    = null;
    private bool               _running     = true;
    private bool               _loading     = false;
    private int                _maxMessages = 100;
    private string             _filterText       = string.Empty;
    private string?            _filterParseError = null;
    private CancellationTokenSource _cts = new();

    private static readonly string[] SearchableFields = ["Key", "Value"];
    private static readonly FilterParser Parser = new(SearchableFields,
        new Dictionary<string, string>
        {
            ["key"]       = "Key",
            ["partition"] = "Partition",
            ["offset"]    = "Offset",
            ["value"]     = "Value",
        });

    private static readonly (string Aliases, string Label)[] _fieldHints =
    [
        ("key",       "message key"),
        ("partition", "partition number (e.g. partition:0)"),
        ("offset",    "offset (e.g. offset:>1000)"),
        ("value",     "value content (full text)"),
    ];

    protected override Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        _ = StreamAsync();
        return Task.CompletedTask;
    }

    private async Task StreamAsync()
    {
        _loading = true;
        StateHasChanged();
        try
        {
            await foreach (var msg in KafkaSvc.TailTopicAsync(Environment, TopicName, _maxMessages, _cts.Token))
            {
                if (!_running) continue;
                _messages.Insert(0, msg);
                // In bounded mode cap the buffer; in live mode keep last N (use 500 as buffer cap)
                var cap = _maxMessages > 0 ? _maxMessages : 500;
                if (_messages.Count > cap)
                    _messages.RemoveAt(_messages.Count - 1);
                ApplyFilter();
                StateHasChanged();
            }
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) { }
        finally { _loading = false; StateHasChanged(); }
    }

    private void ToggleRunning() => _running = !_running;

    private void Clear()
    {
        _messages.Clear();
        _filtered.Clear();
        _selected = null;
    }

    private void Restart()
    {
        _cts.Cancel();
        _cts = new CancellationTokenSource();
        _messages.Clear();
        _filtered.Clear();
        _selected  = null;
        _running   = true;
        _ = StreamAsync();
    }

    private void OnMaxChanged(int max)
    {
        _maxMessages = max;
        Restart();
    }

    private void OnFilterChanged(string text)
    {
        _filterText       = text;
        _filterParseError = null;
        ApplyFilter();
    }

    private void ApplyFilter()
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_filterText))
        {
            _filtered = _messages;
            return;
        }
        FilterNode? node = null;
        try   { node = Parser.Parse(_filterText); }
        catch (FilterParseException ex) { _filterParseError = ex.Message; _filtered = _messages; return; }

        _filtered = _messages.Where(m => FilterEvaluator.Evaluate(node, m)).ToList();
    }

    private void OnRowSelected(KafkaMessage? msg)
        => _selected = ReferenceEquals(_selected, msg) ? null : msg;

    private async Task DownloadMessageAsync(KafkaMessage? msg)
    {
        if (msg is null) return;
        var pretty   = FormatJson(msg.Value);
        var filename = $"{(msg.Key ?? $"offset-{msg.Offset}")}.json";
        // Sanitise: remove chars not valid in filenames
        filename = string.Concat(filename.Select(c => Path.GetInvalidFileNameChars().Contains(c) ? '_' : c));
        await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("bmSaveFile", filename, pretty, "application/json");
    }

    private static string TruncateValue(string v)
        => v.Length > 120 ? v[..120] + "…" : v;

    private static string FormatJson(string raw)
    {
        try
        {
            var doc = System.Text.Json.JsonDocument.Parse(raw);
            return System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(
                doc.RootElement,
                new System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions { WriteIndented = true });
        }
        catch { return raw; }
    }

    public void Dispose() => _cts.Cancel();
}

LENGTH 29211

                {
                    <div class="bm-lb-empty">
                        <MudText Typo="Typo.body2" Class="bm-muted">No files found.</MudText>
                    </div>
                }
                else if (_files.Count > 0)
                {
                    <MudTable Items="@_files" Dense="true" Hover="true" Striped="false"
                              Class="bm-lb-file-table" FixedHeader="true" Height="100%"
                              RowClass="bm-lb-file-row"
                              SortLabel="Sort by">
                        <HeaderContent>
                            <MudTh><MudTableSortLabel SortBy="new Func<LogFileEntry,object>(x => x.Server)">Host</MudTableSortLabel></MudTh>
                            <MudTh><MudTableSortLabel SortBy="new Func<LogFileEntry,object>(x => x.FileName)">File</MudTableSortLabel></MudTh>
                            <MudTh Style="text-align:right"><MudTableSortLabel SortBy="new Func<LogFileEntry,object>(x => x.SizeBytes)">Size</MudTableSortLabel></MudTh>
                            <MudTh><MudTableSortLabel SortBy="new Func<LogFileEntry,object>(x => x.CreatedUtc)">Created</MudTableSortLabel></MudTh>
                            <MudTh><MudTableSortLabel SortBy="new Func<LogFileEntry,object>(x => x.LastModifiedUtc)" InitialDirection="SortDirection.Descending">Last Updated</MudTableSortLabel></MudTh>
                            <MudTh></MudTh>
                        </HeaderContent>
                        <RowTemplate>
                            <MudTd DataLabel="Host" @ondblclick="@(() => OpenInViewer(context))"><MudText Typo="Typo.body2" Class="bm-monospace bm-muted">@context.Server</MudText></MudTd>
                            <MudTd DataLabel="File" @ondblclick="@(() => OpenInViewer(context))"><MudText Typo="Typo.body2">@context.FileName</MudText></MudTd>
                            <MudTd DataLabel="Size" Style="text-align:right" @ondblclick="@(() => OpenInViewer(context))">
                                <MudText Typo="Typo.body2" Class="bm-monospace">@FormatSize(context.SizeBytes)</MudText>
                            </MudTd>
                            <MudTd DataLabel="Created" @ondblclick="@(() => OpenInViewer(context))">
                                <MudText Typo="Typo.body2" Class="bm-monospace bm-muted">@context.CreatedUtc.ToLocalTime().ToString("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")</MudText>
                            </MudTd>
                            <MudTd DataLabel="Last Updated" @ondblclick="@(() => OpenInViewer(context))">
                                <MudText Typo="Typo.body2" Class="bm-monospace">@context.LastModifiedUtc.ToLocalTime().ToString("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")</MudText>
                            </MudTd>
                            <MudTd>
                                <MudTooltip Text="Copy full path">
                                    <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.ContentCopy"
                                                   Size="Size.Small"
                                                   OnClick="@(() => CopyPathAsync(context.FullPath))" />
                                </MudTooltip>
                                <MudTooltip Text="Open in Log Viewer">
                                    <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.OpenInNew"
                                                   Size="Size.Small"
                                                   OnClick="@(() => OpenInViewer(context))" />
                                </MudTooltip>
                            </MudTd>
                        </RowTemplate>
                    </MudTable>
                }
            }
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@code {
    [Parameter] public string  Env            { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    [Parameter] public string? NavigationHint { get; set; }

    // ── filter grammar for log lines ──────────────────────────────────────
    private static readonly FilterParser LogLineParser = new(
        searchableFields: ["Level", "Machine", "Message"],
        aliases: new Dictionary<string, string>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
        {
            ["ts"]        = "Timestamp",
            ["timestamp"] = "Timestamp",
            ["level"]     = "Level",
            ["machine"]   = "Machine",
            ["pid"]       = "Pid",
            ["thread"]    = "ThreadId",
            ["tid"]       = "ThreadId",
            ["msg"]       = "Message",
            ["message"]   = "Message",
            ["caller"]    = "Caller",
        });

    private static readonly (string Aliases, string Label)[] ContentFieldHints =
    [
        ("ts / timestamp", "entry timestamp"),
        ("level",          "INFO · WARN · ERROR · DEBUG"),
        ("machine",        "server / machine name"),
        ("pid",            "process id (integer)"),
        ("thread / tid",   "thread id (integer)"),
        ("msg / message",  "log message text"),
        ("caller",         "calling method"),
    ];

    // ── panel resize ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    private ElementReference _bodyRef;
    private ElementReference _treePanelRef;
    private double            _treePanelWidth = 280;
    private DotNetObjectReference<LogBrowser>? _selfRef;

    [JSInvokable]
    public void SetTreeWidth(double width) =>
        _treePanelWidth = Math.Clamp(width, 160, 600);

    private async Task OnResizerMouseDown(MouseEventArgs e)
    {
        _selfRef ??= DotNetObjectReference.Create(this);
        await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("logBrowserResizer.start", e.ClientX, _selfRef, _bodyRef, _treePanelRef);
    }

    // ── tree state ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    private List<string>        _servers   = new();
    private List<LogFolderNode> _rootNodes = new();

    private readonly Dictionary<string, IReadOnlyList<LogFolderNode>> _childCache =
        new(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
    private readonly HashSet<string> _expanded = new(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

    private readonly LogFolderNode _loadingNode = new("…", "__loading__", false);

    // double-click detection
    private DateTime _lastClickTime = DateTime.MinValue;
    private string?  _lastClickPath;

    // ── file / search state ───────────────────────────────────────────────
    private string?            _selectedPath;
    private List<LogFileEntry> _files        = new();
    private bool               _loadingFiles;
    private bool               _initialized;
    private DateTime?          _lastScan;
    private string?            _lastHint;
    private string?            _initError;

    // search
    private string    _fileGlob           = "*.log";
    private string    _contentFilterStr   = "";
    private FilterNode? _contentFilterNode;
    private string?   _contentFilterError;
    private bool      _isSearching;
    private bool      _isSearchMode;      // true = table shows recursive search results

    private bool _isSearchRequested =>
        _fileGlob != "*.log" || !string.IsNullOrEmpty(_contentFilterStr);

    private CancellationTokenSource _cts        = new();
    private CancellationTokenSource? _searchCts;
    private PeriodicTimer?           _pollTimer;
    private DateTime                 _lastManualPoll = DateTime.MinValue;

    // ── lifecycle ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        var statuses = await HeartbeatSvc.GetServiceStatusesAsync(Env, _cts.Token);
        var hosts    = statuses.Select(s => s.HostName).Distinct(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
        _servers     = BrowserSvc.GetServers(hosts).ToList();

        try
        {
            var roots  = await BrowserSvc.GetSubfoldersAsync(_servers, "", _cts.Token);
            _rootNodes = roots.ToList();
        }
        catch (Exception ex) { _initError = ex.Message; }

        _initialized = true;
        _lastScan    = DateTime.UtcNow;
        StartPolling();
    }

    protected override async Task OnParametersSetAsync()
    {
        if (NavigationHint is not null && NavigationHint != _lastHint)
        {
            _lastHint = NavigationHint;
            if (_initialized)
                await ApplyHintAsync(NavigationHint);
        }
    }

    // ── filter inputs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private void OnGlobChanged(string v) => _fileGlob = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(v) ? "*.log" : v;

    private void OnContentFilterChanged(string v)
    {
        _contentFilterStr   = v;
        _contentFilterError = null;
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(v)) { _contentFilterNode = null; return; }
        try   { _contentFilterNode = LogLineParser.Parse(v); }
        catch (Exception ex) { _contentFilterError = ex.Message; _contentFilterNode = null; }
    }

    // ── toolbar button: search / stop / refresh ───────────────────────────

    private async Task OnActionButtonClickAsync()
    {
        if (_isSearching)
        {
            StopSearch();
        }
        else if (_isSearchRequested)
        {
            await StartSearchAsync();
        }
        else
        {
            await RefreshAsync();
        }
    }

    // ── tree interaction ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task OnTreeNodeSelectedAsync(LogFolderNode? node)
    {
        if (node is null || node.RelativePath == "__loading__") return;

        // Clicking the tree always exits search mode.
        if (_isSearching) StopSearch();
        _isSearchMode = false;

        await SelectPathAsync(node.RelativePath);
    }

    private async Task OnItemClickAsync(LogFolderNode node)
    {
        if (!node.HasChildren) return;
        var now = DateTime.UtcNow;
        if (_lastClickPath == node.RelativePath && (now - _lastClickTime).TotalMilliseconds < 350)
        {
            _lastClickPath = null;
            var isExpanded = _expanded.Contains(node.RelativePath);
            await OnExpandedChangedAsync(node, !isExpanded);
        }
        else
        {
            _lastClickPath = node.RelativePath;
            _lastClickTime = now;
        }
    }

    private async Task OnExpandedChangedAsync(LogFolderNode node, bool expanded)
    {
        if (expanded)
        {
            _expanded.Add(node.RelativePath);
            if (!_childCache.ContainsKey(node.RelativePath))
            {
                var children = await BrowserSvc.GetSubfoldersAsync(_servers, node.RelativePath, _cts.Token);
                _childCache[node.RelativePath] = children;
                StateHasChanged();
            }
        }
        else
        {
            _expanded.Remove(node.RelativePath);
        }
    }

    // ── selection (normal mode) ───────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task SelectPathAsync(string relativePath)
    {
        _selectedPath = relativePath;
        var minInterval = LogSettings.Value.FolderScanMinIntervalSeconds;
        if ((DateTime.UtcNow - _lastManualPoll).TotalSeconds >= minInterval)
        {
            _lastManualPoll = DateTime.UtcNow;
            await LoadFilesAsync();
        }
        else { StateHasChanged(); }
    }

    private async Task NavigateBreadcrumbAsync(string relativePath)
    {
        if (_isSearching) StopSearch();
        _isSearchMode = false;
        await SelectPathAsync(relativePath);
    }

    private void ClearSelection()
    {
        if (_isSearching) StopSearch();
        _isSearchMode = false;
        _selectedPath = null;
        _files.Clear();
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    // ── hint navigation ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task ApplyHintAsync(string fullPath)
    {
        var parsed = BrowserSvc.ParseHintPath(fullPath, _servers);
        if (parsed is null) return;

        var segments = parsed.Value.RelativePath.Split('\\', StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries);
        var current  = "";
        foreach (var seg in segments)
        {
            if (!_childCache.ContainsKey(current))
            {
                var ch = await BrowserSvc.GetSubfoldersAsync(_servers, current, _cts.Token);
                _childCache[current] = ch;
                if (current == "") _rootNodes = ch.ToList();
            }
            current = string.IsNullOrEmpty(current) ? seg : current + "\\" + seg;
            _expanded.Add(current);
        }

        _selectedPath = parsed.Value.RelativePath;
        await LoadFilesAsync();
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    // ── file loading (normal mode) ────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task LoadFilesAsync()
    {
        if (_selectedPath is null) return;
        _loadingFiles = true;
        StateHasChanged();

        var path    = _selectedPath;
        var pending = new List<LogFileEntry>();
        var first   = true;
        try
        {
            var serverTasks = _servers.Select(async server =>
            {
                var results = await BrowserSvc.GetFilesAsync([server], path, _cts.Token);
                await InvokeAsync(() =>
                {
                    pending.AddRange(results);
                    if (first) { first = false; _files = new List<LogFileEntry>(pending); }
                    else       { _files.AddRange(results); }
                    StateHasChanged();
                });
            });

            await Task.WhenAll(serverTasks);
            if (first) _files.Clear();
            _lastScan = DateTime.UtcNow;
        }
        finally
        {
            _loadingFiles = false;
            StateHasChanged();
        }
    }

    // ── search (recursive mode) ───────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task StartSearchAsync()
    {
        if (_selectedPath is null) return;
        if (_contentFilterError is not null) return;

        StopSearch();

        _searchCts    = CancellationTokenSource.CreateLinkedTokenSource(_cts.Token);
        _isSearching  = true;
        _isSearchMode = true;
        _loadingFiles = true;
        _files.Clear();
        StateHasChanged();

        var path   = _selectedPath;
        var glob   = _fileGlob;
        var filter = _contentFilterNode;
        var ct     = _searchCts.Token;

        try
        {
            await foreach (var entry in BrowserSvc.SearchAsync(_servers, path, glob, filter, ct))
            {
                await InvokeAsync(() => { _files.Add(entry); StateHasChanged(); });
            }
            _lastScan = DateTime.UtcNow;
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) { }
        finally
        {
            _isSearching  = false;
            _loadingFiles = false;
            await InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged);
        }
    }

    private void StopSearch()
    {
        _searchCts?.Cancel();
        _searchCts?.Dispose();
        _searchCts   = null;
        _isSearching = false;
    }

    // ── refresh / polling ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task RefreshAsync()
    {
        var roots  = await BrowserSvc.GetSubfoldersAsync(_servers, "", _cts.Token);
        _rootNodes = roots.ToList();

        if (_selectedPath is not null)
            await LoadFilesAsync();
        else { _lastScan = DateTime.UtcNow; StateHasChanged(); }
    }

    private void StartPolling()
    {
        var interval = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(Math.Max(5, LogSettings.Value.FolderScanIntervalSeconds));
        _pollTimer   = new PeriodicTimer(interval);
        _ = PollLoopAsync();
    }

    private async Task PollLoopAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            while (_pollTimer is not null && await _pollTimer.WaitForNextTickAsync(_cts.Token))
                // Skip auto-refresh while a search is running.
                if (_selectedPath is not null && !_isSearching && !_isSearchMode)
                    await InvokeAsync(LoadFilesAsync);
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) { }
    }

    // ── helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private void OpenInViewer(LogFileEntry file) =>
        TabService.OpenOrFocus(TabModel.CreateLogViewer(file.FullPath, Env));

    private async Task OpenLocalFileAsync()
    {
        _selfRef ??= DotNetObjectReference.Create(this);
        await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("bmOpenLocalLogFile", _selfRef);
    }

    [JSInvokable]
    public void OnLocalFileOpened(string key, string filename)
    {
        InvokeAsync(() =>
        {
            var label = System.IO.Path.GetFileName(filename) is { Length: > 0 } n ? n : filename;
            var tab = TabModel.CreateLogViewer("local:" + key, Env);
            tab.Label      = label;
            tab.NoNavigate = true;
            TabService.OpenOrFocus(tab);
        });
    }


    private async Task CopyPathAsync(string path) =>
        await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("navigator.clipboard.writeText", path);

    private static string FormatSize(long bytes)
    {
        if (bytes < 1024)      return FormattableString.Invariant($"{bytes} B");
        if (bytes < 1_048_576) return FormattableString.Invariant($"{bytes / 1024.0:F1} KB");
        return FormattableString.Invariant($"{bytes / 1_048_576.0:F1} MB");
    }

    public async ValueTask DisposeAsync()
    {
        StopSearch();
        _selfRef?.Dispose();
        await _cts.CancelAsync();
        _cts.Dispose();
        _pollTimer?.Dispose();
    }
}

@code {
    [Parameter] public string? Path     { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public string  Env      { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    [Parameter] public string? FileName { get; set; }

    private static readonly int[] _fontSizes = [11, 12, 13, 14, 15, 16];

    private static readonly (string Aliases, string Label)[] LogFieldHints =
    [
        ("level, lvl",       "Log level (INFO, WARN, ERROR, DEBUG)"),
        ("host",             "Server host name"),
        ("pid",              "Process ID"),
        ("threadId, tid",    "Thread ID"),
        ("message, msg",     "Log message text"),
        ("caller",           "Caller method"),
        ("timestamp, ts",    "Timestamp"),
    ];

    // DOM / JS interop
    private ElementReference          _bodyRef;
    private bool                      _rendered;
    private bool                      _dirty;
    private DotNetObjectReference<LogViewer>? _dotNetRef;

    // Loading state
    private string? _loadedPath;
    private bool    _isLoading;
    private string? _error;
    private string? _rawContent;
    private string? _localKey;   // set instead of _rawContent for browser-local files
    private int?    _anchorLine;
    private long    _fileOffset;

    // Filter
    private string  _filterStr   = "";
    private string? _filterError;
    private int     _totalCount;
    private int     _visibleCount;

    // Find
    private string _findTerm      = "";
    private bool   _isRegex;
    private bool   _caseSensitive;
    private int    _matchCount;
    private int    _matchCurrent;

    // Display
    private int  _fontSize = 13;
    private bool _wordWrap = true;

    // Live tail
    private bool           _isTailing;
    private PeriodicTimer? _tailTimer;
    private CancellationTokenSource _cts = new();

    private string _fileName => FileName is { Length: > 0 } fn ? fn :
        System.IO.Path.GetFileName((Path ?? "").TrimEnd('\\', '/')) is { Length: > 0 } n ? n : "Log";

    private string _pathDisplay => Path?.StartsWith("local:", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) == true
        ? "local file" : (Path ?? "");

    private string MatchLabel =>
        _matchCount == 0 ? "" : $"{_matchCurrent}/{_matchCount}";

    // ── Lifecycle ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    protected override async Task OnParametersSetAsync()
    {
        if (Path == _loadedPath) return;
        _loadedPath = Path;
        _anchorLine = ParseAnchorLine(new Uri(Nav.Uri).Fragment);
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    protected override async Task OnAfterRenderAsync(bool firstRender)
    {
        _rendered = true;
        if (_dirty)
        {
            _dirty = false;
            await RenderViewerAsync();
            _dotNetRef ??= DotNetObjectReference.Create(this);
            try { await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("logViewer.registerDotNetRef", _bodyRef, _dotNetRef); }
            catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
        }
    }

    [JSInvokable]
    public async Task OnWordSelected(string word)
    {
        _findTerm = word;
        await RunFindAsync();
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    // ── File loading ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Path)) return;
        _isLoading = true;
        _error     = null;
        StopTail();
        StateHasChanged();

        try
        {
            if (Path!.StartsWith("local:", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            {
                // Content stays in browser JS memory — never transfer over SignalR.
                _localKey   = Path["local:".Length..];
                _rawContent = null;
                _fileOffset = 0;
            }
            else
            {
                _localKey = null;
                (_rawContent, _fileOffset) = await LogViewerSvc.ReadAllAsync(Path!, _cts.Token);
            }
            _dirty = true;
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) { }
        catch (Exception ex) { _error = ex.Message; }
        finally
        {
            _isLoading = false;
            StateHasChanged();
        }
    }

    private async Task RenderViewerAsync()
    {
        if (_rawContent is null && _localKey is null) return;
        if (!_rendered) return;
        try
        {
            var opts = new { anchorLine = _anchorLine, fontSize = _fontSize, wordWrap = _wordWrap };
            if (_localKey is not null)
            {
                await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("logViewer.renderLocalFile", _bodyRef, _localKey, opts);
                _localKey = null;
            }
            else
            {
                await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("logViewer.render", _bodyRef, _rawContent, opts);
                _rawContent = null;
                StartTail();
            }
        }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            Console.Error.WriteLine($"[LogViewer] JS render error: {ex.Message}");
        }
    }

    // ── Refresh ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task RefreshAsync()
    {
        _loadedPath = null; // force reload
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    // ── Find ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task OnFindKeyDown(KeyboardEventArgs e)
    {
        if (e.Key == "Enter")
        {
            if (e.ShiftKey) await PrevMatchAsync();
            else            await RunFindAsync();
        }
    }

    private async Task RunFindAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            var result = await JS.InvokeAsync<MatchResult>(
                "logViewer.find", _bodyRef, _findTerm,
                new { isRegex = _isRegex, caseSensitive = _caseSensitive });
            _matchCount   = result.Count;
            _matchCurrent = result.Current;
        }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
    }

    private async Task NextMatchAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            var result = await JS.InvokeAsync<MatchResult>("logViewer.nextMatch", _bodyRef);
            _matchCount   = result.Count;
            _matchCurrent = result.Current;
        }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
    }

    private async Task PrevMatchAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            var result = await JS.InvokeAsync<MatchResult>("logViewer.prevMatch", _bodyRef);
            _matchCount   = result.Count;
            _matchCurrent = result.Current;
        }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
    }

    private async Task OnRegexToggled(bool val)  { _isRegex       = val; await RunFindAsync(); }
    private async Task OnCaseToggled(bool val)   { _caseSensitive = val; await RunFindAsync(); }

    // ── Filter ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task OnFilterChangedAsync(string expr)
    {
_filterStr   = expr;
        _filterError = null;
        try
        {
            var result = await JS.InvokeAsync<FilterResult>("logViewer.setFilter", _bodyRef, expr);
            _totalCount   = result.Total;
            _visibleCount = result.Visible;
        }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
        catch (Exception ex) { _filterError = ex.Message; }
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    // ── Bookmarks ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task PrevBookmarkAsync()
    {
        try { await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("logViewer.prevBookmark", _bodyRef); }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
    }

    private async Task NextBookmarkAsync()
    {
        try { await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("logViewer.nextBookmark", _bodyRef); }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
    }

    // ── Display controls ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task DecreaseFontAsync()
    {
        var idx = Array.IndexOf(_fontSizes, _fontSize);
        if (idx > 0) { _fontSize = _fontSizes[idx - 1]; await ApplyFontAsync(); }
    }

    private async Task IncreaseFontAsync()
    {
        var idx = Array.IndexOf(_fontSizes, _fontSize);
        if (idx < _fontSizes.Length - 1) { _fontSize = _fontSizes[idx + 1]; await ApplyFontAsync(); }
    }

    private async Task OnWrapToggled(bool val)
    {
        _wordWrap = val;
        try { await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("logViewer.setWordWrap", _bodyRef, _wordWrap); }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
    }

    private async Task ApplyFontAsync()
    {
        try { await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("logViewer.setFontSize", _bodyRef, _fontSize); }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
    }

    // ── Share link ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task ShareAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            var lineIdx = await JS.InvokeAsync<int>("logViewer.getCurrentTopLine", _bodyRef);
            var baseUrl  = Nav.Uri.Split('#')[0];
            var shareUrl = $"{baseUrl}#L{lineIdx + 1}"; // display as 1-based
            await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("copyText", shareUrl);
            await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("showCopyToast", "Share link copied");
        }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
    }

    // ── Live tail ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private void StartTail()
    {
        _isTailing = true;
        _tailTimer = new PeriodicTimer(TimeSpan.FromSeconds(10));
        _ = TailLoopAsync();
    }

    private void StopTail()
    {
        _isTailing = false;
        _tailTimer?.Dispose();
        _tailTimer = null;
    }

    private async Task TailLoopAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            while (_tailTimer is not null && await _tailTimer.WaitForNextTickAsync(_cts.Token))
                await InvokeAsync(TailTickAsync);
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) { }
    }

    private async Task TailTickAsync()
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Path)) return;
        try
        {
            var (text, newOffset) = LogViewerSvc.ReadDelta(Path!, _fileOffset);
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(text)) return;
            _fileOffset = newOffset;
            await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("logViewer.appendRaw", _bodyRef, text);
        }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
        catch { /* non-critical — will retry on next tick */ }
    }

    // ── Helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private static int? ParseAnchorLine(string fragment)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(fragment)) return null;
        var frag = fragment.TrimStart('#');
        if (frag.StartsWith("L", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            && int.TryParse(frag[1..], out var line) && line > 0)
            return line - 1; // 1-based display → 0-based lineIndex
        return null;
    }

    private sealed record MatchResult(int Count, int Current);
    private sealed record FilterResult(int Total, int Visible);

    public async ValueTask DisposeAsync()
    {
        StopTail();
        await _cts.CancelAsync();
        _cts.Dispose();
        _dotNetRef?.Dispose();
        try { await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("logViewer.destroy", _bodyRef); }
        catch { }
    }
}
FILE src/NxtUI.Web/Pages/MemoryGraph.razor
LENGTH 18107
@using NxtUI.Models
@using NxtUI.Services
@using NxtUI.Logging
@inject IHeartbeatService HeartbeatSvc
@inject IServiceMetricsMonitor MetricsMonitor
@inject IJSRuntime JS
@implements IAsyncDisposable

<div class="bm-page bm-page-fill bm-mg-page">

    <!-- ── Toolbar ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="bm-batch-toolbar bm-mg-toolbar">

        <!-- Grouping -->
        <span class="bm-svc-grouping-label">Group</span>
        <MudButtonGroup Size="Size.Small" Variant="Variant.Outlined" Class="bm-svc-group-toggle">
            <MudButton Class="@(_groupBy == GroupBy.None    ? "bm-view-btn-active" : "bm-view-btn-inactive")" OnClick="@(() => SetGroupBy(GroupBy.None))">None</MudButton>
            <MudButton Class="@(_groupBy == GroupBy.Service ? "bm-view-btn-active" : "bm-view-btn-inactive")" OnClick="@(() => SetGroupBy(GroupBy.Service))">Service</MudButton>
            <MudButton Class="@(_groupBy == GroupBy.Host    ? "bm-view-btn-active" : "bm-view-btn-inactive")" OnClick="@(() => SetGroupBy(GroupBy.Host))">Host</MudButton>

            <MudButton Class="@(_chartType == ChartType.Line     ? "bm-view-btn-active" : "bm-view-btn-inactive")" OnClick="@(() => SetChartType(ChartType.Line))">Line</MudButton>
            <MudButton Class="@(_chartType == ChartType.Sunburst ? "bm-view-btn-active" : "bm-view-btn-inactive")" OnClick="@(() => SetChartType(ChartType.Sunburst))">Sunburst</MudButton>

            <span class="bm-toolbar-hint">Updated @_lastUpdated.Value.ToLocalTime().ToString("HH:mm:ss")</span>
        }

    <div class="bm-mg-body">

        <!-- Legend / filter panel -->

            @foreach (var item in _legendItems)

                    <input type="checkbox"
                           checked="@item.Visible"
                           @onchange="@(e => ToggleLegendItem(item, (bool)(e.Value ?? false)))" />
                    <span class="bm-mg-legend-dot" style="background:@item.Color"></span>
                    <span class="bm-mg-legend-label" title="@item.Name">@item.Name</span>
                    <span class="bm-mg-legend-value">@FormatMb(item.CurrentMb)</span>
                </label>
            }
