@code {
    [Parameter] public string Env { get; set; } = string.Empty;

    // ── enums ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    private enum GroupBy   { None, Service, Host }
    private enum ChartType { Line, Sunburst }

    // ── state ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    private GroupBy   _groupBy   = GroupBy.Service;
    private ChartType _chartType = ChartType.Line;

    private IDisposable?         _subscription;
    private DateTime?            _lastUpdated;
    private List<ServiceStatus>  _services = [];

    private sealed class LegendItem
    {
        public string  Key       { get; init; } = "";   // grouping key
        public string  Name      { get; init; } = "";
        public string  Color     { get; init; } = "#888";
        public bool    Visible   { get; set;  } = true;
        public double  CurrentMb { get; set;  }
    }

    private List<LegendItem>    _legendItems = [];
    private List<LineSeriesDto> _lineSeries  = [];
    private ElementReference    _chartRef;
    private bool                _chartDirty  = true;

    private sealed record LineSeriesDto(string Name, string Color, double[] Data, string[] Labels);

    // 16-color palette
    private static readonly string[] Palette =
    [
        "#4e79a7","#f28e2b","#e15759","#76b7b2","#59a14f",
        "#edc948","#b07aa1","#ff9da7","#9c755f","#bab0ac",
        "#d37295","#fabfd2","#8cd17d","#86bcb6","#499894","#a0cbe8"
    ];

    // ── lifecycle ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    protected override void OnInitialized()
    {
        _subscription = MetricsMonitor.Subscribe(Env);
        MetricsMonitor.OnMetricsUpdated += OnMetricsUpdated;
    }

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        _services = await HeartbeatSvc.GetServiceStatusesAsync(Env);
        Rebuild();
    }

    protected override async Task OnAfterRenderAsync(bool firstRender)
    {
        if (_chartDirty)
        {
            _chartDirty = false;
            if (_chartType == ChartType.Sunburst)
                await RenderSunburstAsync();
            else
                await RenderLineAsync();
        }
    }

    private void OnMetricsUpdated(string env)
    {
        if (env != Env) return;
        _ = InvokeAsync(async () =>
        {
            _services = await HeartbeatSvc.GetServiceStatusesAsync(Env);
            Rebuild();
            StateHasChanged();
        });
    }

    // ── grouping / chart type ─────────────────────────────────────────────

    private void SetGroupBy(GroupBy g)
    {
        _groupBy = g;
        Rebuild();
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    private void SetChartType(ChartType t)
    {
        _chartType = t;
        _chartDirty = true;
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    private void ToggleLegendItem(LegendItem item, bool visible)
    {
        item.Visible = visible;
        BuildChartData();
        _chartDirty = true;
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    // ── data building ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private void Rebuild()
    {
        _lastUpdated = DateTime.UtcNow;
        var services = _services;

        // Build legend items keyed by group
        var groups = GroupServices(services);
        var prevVisibility = _legendItems.ToDictionary(i => i.Key, i => i.Visible);

        _legendItems = groups.Select((kv, idx) =>
        {
            var color = Palette[idx % Palette.Length];
            var mb    = kv.Value.Sum(s => GetCurrentMb(s));
            return new LegendItem
            {
                Key       = kv.Key,
                Name      = kv.Key,
                Color     = color,
                CurrentMb = mb,
                Visible   = prevVisibility.TryGetValue(kv.Key, out var v) ? v : true
            };
        }).ToList();

        BuildChartData();
        _chartDirty = true;
    }

    private Dictionary<string, List<ServiceStatus>> GroupServices(IEnumerable<ServiceStatus> services)
    {
        var result = new Dictionary<string, List<ServiceStatus>>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
        foreach (var svc in services)
        {
            var key = _groupBy switch
            {
                GroupBy.Host    => svc.HostName,
                GroupBy.Service => svc.ServiceName,
                _               => svc.ServiceName + "|" + svc.ProcessId   // None = individual
            };
            if (!result.TryGetValue(key, out var list))
                result[key] = list = [];
            list.Add(svc);
        }
        return result;
    }

    private void BuildChartData()
    {
        var services  = _services;
        var groups    = GroupServices(services);
        var colorMap  = _legendItems.ToDictionary(i => i.Key, i => i.Color);
        var visible   = _legendItems.Where(i => i.Visible).Select(i => i.Key).ToHashSet(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

        // Line chart: build one series per visible group, aligned on a shared time axis
        BuildLineData(groups, colorMap, visible);
    }

    private void BuildLineData(
        Dictionary<string, List<ServiceStatus>> groups,
        Dictionary<string, string> colorMap,
        HashSet<string> visible)
    {
        // Collect all histories to find the global time range
        var allSamples = new List<(string key, MetricsSample sample)>();
        foreach (var (key, svcs) in groups)
        {
            if (!visible.Contains(key)) continue;
            foreach (var svc in svcs)
            {
                var hist = MetricsMonitor.GetHistory(Env, svc);
                allSamples.AddRange(hist.Select(s => (key, s)));
            }
        }

        if (allSamples.Count == 0) { _lineSeries = []; return; }

        // Shared time axis — up to 120 buckets
        var minTime  = allSamples.Min(x => x.sample.Timestamp);
        var maxTime  = allSamples.Max(x => x.sample.Timestamp);
        var span     = maxTime - minTime;
        int buckets  = Math.Clamp((int)span.TotalMinutes + 1, 2, 120);
        var interval = span.TotalSeconds / (buckets - 1);
        if (interval < 1) interval = 1;

        var times = Enumerable.Range(0, buckets)
            .Select(i => minTime.AddSeconds(i * interval))
            .ToArray();

        var labels = times.Select((t, i) =>
            i % Math.Max(1, buckets / 10) == 0
                ? t.ToLocalTime().ToString("HH:mm")
                : "").ToArray();

        _lineSeries = [];
        foreach (var (key, svcs) in groups)
        {
            if (!visible.Contains(key)) continue;
            var history = svcs.SelectMany(svc => MetricsMonitor.GetHistory(Env, svc)).ToList();
            if (history.Count == 0) continue;

            var data = new double[buckets];
            for (int i = 0; i < buckets; i++)
            {
                var t    = times[i];
                var prev = history.Where(s => s.Timestamp <= t).MaxBy(s => s.Timestamp);
                data[i]  = prev is not null ? prev.TotalCurrentBytes / 1e6 : 0;
            }

            var color = colorMap.TryGetValue(key, out var c) ? c : "#888";
            _lineSeries.Add(new LineSeriesDto(key, color, data, labels));
        }
    }

    // ── sunburst ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task RenderLineAsync()
    {
        try { await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("memoryLineChart.render", _chartRef, _lineSeries); }
        catch { }
    }

    private async Task RenderSunburstAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            var data = BuildSunburstData();
            await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("memorySunburst.render", _chartRef, data, new { });
        }
        catch { }
    }

    private object BuildSunburstData()
    {
        var services = _services;
        var groups   = GroupServices(services);
        var visible  = _legendItems.Where(i => i.Visible).Select(i => i.Key).ToHashSet(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
        var colorMap = _legendItems.ToDictionary(i => i.Key, i => i.Color);

        var groupObjects = new List<object>();

        foreach (var (key, svcs) in groups)
        {
            if (!visible.Contains(key)) continue;
            var color = colorMap.TryGetValue(key, out var c) ? c : "#888";

            if (_groupBy == GroupBy.None)
            {
                // Each entry = one service; split into main + child process
                foreach (var svc in svcs)
                {
                    var latest = MetricsMonitor.GetLatest(Env, svc);
                    if (latest is null) continue;

                    var mainBytes  = latest.CurrentUsageBytes;
                    var childBytes = latest.ChildUsageBytes;
                    var children   = new List<object>();

                    if (mainBytes > 0)
                        children.Add(new { name = svc.ServiceName + " (main)", value = mainBytes, color });

                    if (childBytes > 0)
                    {
                        var childColor = AdjustBrightness(color, 0.65);
                        children.Add(new { name = svc.ProcessId + "+ (child)", value = childBytes, color = childColor });
                    }

                    if (children.Count == 0) continue;
                    var total = mainBytes + childBytes;
                    groupObjects.Add(new { name = key, value = total, color, children });
                }
            }
            else
            {
                // Aggregate across all svcs in this group
                long totalBytes = 0;
                var children = new List<object>();
                int ci = 0;
                foreach (var svc in svcs)
                {
                    var latest = MetricsMonitor.GetLatest(Env, svc);
                    if (latest is null) continue;
                    var bytes = latest.TotalCurrentBytes;
                    if (bytes == 0) continue;
                    totalBytes += bytes;
                    var childColor = ShiftHue(color, ci++ * 20);
                    var childLabel = _groupBy == GroupBy.Host ? svc.ServiceName : svc.HostName;
                    children.Add(new { name = childLabel, value = bytes, color = childColor });
                }
                if (totalBytes == 0) continue;
                groupObjects.Add(new { name = key, value = totalBytes, color, children });
            }
        }

        var grandTotal = groupObjects.Sum(g => (long)((dynamic)g).value);
        return new { total = grandTotal, groups = groupObjects };
    }

    // ── helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private string LegendTitle => _groupBy switch
    {
        GroupBy.Host    => "Hosts",
        GroupBy.Service => "Services",
        _               => "Processes"
    };

    private double GetCurrentMb(ServiceStatus svc)
    {
        var s = MetricsMonitor.GetLatest(Env, svc);
        return s is not null ? s.TotalCurrentBytes / 1e6 : (svc.RamMb ?? 0);
    }

    private static string FormatMb(double mb)
        => mb >= 1000 ? $"{mb / 1024.0:F1} GB" : $"{mb:F0} MB";

    // Very rough HSL hue shift for child items — keeps visual relationship to parent color.
    private static string ShiftHue(string hex, int degrees)
    {
        if (!TryParseHex(hex, out var r, out var g, out var b)) return hex;
        RgbToHsl(r, g, b, out var h, out var s, out var l);
        h = ((h * 360 + degrees) % 360) / 360.0;
        HslToRgb(h, s, l, out var nr, out var ng, out var nb);
        return $"#{nr:X2}{ng:X2}{nb:X2}";
    }

    private static string AdjustBrightness(string hex, double factor)
    {
        if (!TryParseHex(hex, out var r, out var g, out var b)) return hex;
        return $"#{Clamp255(r * factor):X2}{Clamp255(g * factor):X2}{Clamp255(b * factor):X2}";
    }

    private static bool TryParseHex(string hex, out int r, out int g, out int b)
    {
        r = g = b = 0;
        hex = hex.TrimStart('#');
        if (hex.Length != 6) return false;
        r = Convert.ToInt32(hex[..2], 16);
        g = Convert.ToInt32(hex[2..4], 16);
        b = Convert.ToInt32(hex[4..6], 16);
        return true;
    }

    private static int Clamp255(double v) => Math.Clamp((int)Math.Round(v), 0, 255);

    private static void RgbToHsl(int r, int g, int b, out double h, out double s, out double l)
    {
        double rf = r / 255.0, gf = g / 255.0, bf = b / 255.0;
        double max = Math.Max(rf, Math.Max(gf, bf));
        double min = Math.Min(rf, Math.Min(gf, bf));
        l = (max + min) / 2;
        if (max == min) { h = s = 0; return; }
        double d = max - min;
        s = l > 0.5 ? d / (2 - max - min) : d / (max + min);
        h = max == rf ? (gf - bf) / d + (gf < bf ? 6 : 0) :
            max == gf ? (bf - rf) / d + 2 :
                        (rf - gf) / d + 4;
        h /= 6;
    }

    private static void HslToRgb(double h, double s, double l, out int r, out int g, out int b)
    {
        if (s == 0) { r = g = b = Clamp255(l * 255); return; }
        double q = l < 0.5 ? l * (1 + s) : l + s - l * s;
        double p = 2 * l - q;
        r = Clamp255(Hue(p, q, h + 1.0 / 3) * 255);
        g = Clamp255(Hue(p, q, h)           * 255);
        b = Clamp255(Hue(p, q, h - 1.0 / 3) * 255);
    }

    private static double Hue(double p, double q, double t)
    {
        if (t < 0) t += 1; if (t > 1) t -= 1;
        return t < 1.0 / 6 ? p + (q - p) * 6 * t :
               t < 0.5     ? q :
               t < 2.0 / 3 ? p + (q - p) * (2.0 / 3 - t) * 6 : p;
    }

    // ── disposal ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    public async ValueTask DisposeAsync()
    {
        MetricsMonitor.OnMetricsUpdated -= OnMetricsUpdated;
        _subscription?.Dispose();
        try { await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("memorySunburst.destroy", _chartRef); }
        catch { }
    }
}
FILE src/NxtUI.Web/Pages/MongoCollectionInfoDialog.razor

                </div>
            </div>

            <MudDivider Class="my-3" />

            <!-- Indexes table -->
            <MudText Typo="Typo.subtitle2" Class="mb-2">Indexes</MudText>
            <MudTable T="MongoIndexInfo"
                      Items="_details.Indexes"
                      Dense="true"
                      Hover="true"
                      Elevation="0"
                      Class="bm-mini-table">

                    <MudTh>Name</MudTh>

                    <MudTh Style="width:70px; text-align:center;">Sparse</MudTh>
                </HeaderContent>
                <RowTemplate>
                    <MudTd>
                        <code class="bm-mongo-id">@context.Name</code>
                    </MudTd>
                    <MudTd>
                        <code class="bm-kafka-mono" style="font-size:12px;">@context.Keys</code>
                    </MudTd>
                    <MudTd Style="text-align:center;">
                        @if (context.Unique)
                        {
                            <MudIcon Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Check" Size="Size.Small" Color="Color.Success" />
                        }
                    </MudTd>
                    <MudTd Style="text-align:center;">
                        @if (context.Sparse)
                        {
                            <MudIcon Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Check" Size="Size.Small" Color="Color.Info" />
                        }
                    </MudTd>
                </RowTemplate>
            </MudTable>
        }

    </DialogActions>
</MudDialog>

@code {
    [CascadingParameter] IMudDialogInstance MudDialogInstance { get; set; } = null!;

@using NxtUI.Core.Models
@using NxtUI.Core.Services
@using NxtUI.Filtering
@inject IMongoService MongoSvc

@implements IDisposable

<div class="bm-page bm-page-fill bm-inspector">

    <!-- Toolbar -->
    <div class="bm-batch-toolbar">
        <span class="bm-inspector-topic">
            <MudIcon Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.TableChart" Size="Size.Small" Class="bm-inspector-topic-icon" />
            @_database.<span style="opacity:.5;">@_collection</span>
        </span>

        <FilterBox Value="@_search"
                   OnFilterChanged="OnSearchChanged"

                </MudTd>

@code {
    [Parameter] public string EntityId    { get; set; } = string.Empty;  // "database/collection"
    [Parameter] public string Environment { get; set; } = string.Empty;

    private string _database   = string.Empty;
    private string _collection = string.Empty;

    private List<MongoDocument> _allDocs    = new();
    private List<MongoDocument> _docs       = new();
    private MongoDocument?      _selected   = null;
    private string              _search     = string.Empty;
    private string?             _filterParseError = null;
    private bool                _loading    = true;
    private long                _totalCount = 0;
    private int                 _page = 1, _pageSize = 25, _totalPages = 1;
    private CancellationTokenSource _cts = new();

    private static readonly (string Aliases, string Label)[] _fieldHints =
    [
        ("text search", "matches anywhere in the document JSON"),
    ];

    protected override async Task OnParametersSetAsync()
    {
        var parts   = EntityId.Split('/', 2);
        _database   = parts.Length > 0 ? parts[0] : string.Empty;
        _collection = parts.Length > 1 ? parts[1] : string.Empty;
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        _loading = true;
        StateHasChanged();
        try
        {
            // Fetch full page from service (passes search to real backend; mock returns up to 500)
            var (docs, total) = await MongoSvc.GetDocumentsAsync(
                Environment, _database, _collection, null, 0, 500, _cts.Token);
            _allDocs    = docs.ToList();
            _totalCount = total;
            ApplyFilter();
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) { }
        finally { _loading = false; }
    }

    private void OnSearchChanged(string s)
    {
        _search = s;
        _filterParseError = null;
        _page = 1;
        ApplyFilter();
    }

    private void ApplyFilter()
    {
        var filtered = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_search)
            ? _allDocs
            : _allDocs.Where(d =>
                d.Json.Contains(_search, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                d.Id.Contains(_search,   StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
              .ToList();
        _totalCount = filtered.Count;
        _totalPages = Math.Max(1, (int)Math.Ceiling(filtered.Count / (double)_pageSize));
        _page       = Math.Clamp(_page, 1, _totalPages);
        _docs       = filtered.Skip((_page - 1) * _pageSize).Take(_pageSize).ToList();
    }

    private void OnPageChanged(int p) { _page = p; ApplyFilter(); }
    private void OnPageSizeChanged(int s) { _pageSize = s; _page = 1; ApplyFilter(); }

    private void OnRowSelected(MongoDocument? doc)
        => _selected = ReferenceEquals(_selected, doc) ? null : doc;

    private async Task SaveDocumentAsync(MongoDocument? doc)
    {
        if (doc is null) return;
        _selected = doc;
        var pretty   = FormatJson(doc.Json);
        var filename = string.Concat($"{doc.Id}.json"
            .Select(c => Path.GetInvalidFileNameChars().Contains(c) ? '_' : c));
        await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("bmSaveFile", filename, pretty, "application/json");
    }

    private static string TruncateJson(string json)
        => json.Length > 140 ? json[..140] + "…" : json;

    private static string FormatJson(string raw)
    {
        try
        {
            var doc = System.Text.Json.JsonDocument.Parse(raw);
            return System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(
                doc.RootElement,
                new System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions { WriteIndented = true });
        }
        catch { return raw; }
    }

    public void Dispose() => _cts.Cancel();
}

@code {
    [Parameter] public string Environment { get; set; } = string.Empty;

    private List<MongoDatabaseInfo>      _databases = new();
    private List<MongoCollectionSummary> _all       = new();
    private List<MongoCollectionSummary> _filtered  = new();
    private List<MongoCollectionSummary> _paged     = new();
    private string  _selectedDb       = string.Empty;
    private string  _filterText       = string.Empty;
    private string? _filterParseError = null;
    private bool    _loading          = true;
    private int     _page = 1, _pageSize = 25, _totalPages = 1;
    private CancellationTokenSource _cts = new();

    private static readonly string[] SearchableFields = ["Name"];
    private static readonly FilterParser Parser = new(SearchableFields,
        new Dictionary<string, string> { ["name"] = "Name", ["collection"] = "Name" });

    private static readonly (string Aliases, string Label)[] _fieldHints =
    [
        ("name / collection", "collection name"),
    ];

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        _databases = (await MongoSvc.GetDatabasesAsync(Environment, _cts.Token)).ToList();
        if (_databases.Count > 0)
        {
            _selectedDb = _databases[0].Name;
            await LoadCollectionsAsync();
        }
        else { _loading = false; }
    }

    private async Task OnDbChanged(string db)
    {
        _selectedDb = db;
        await LoadCollectionsAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadCollectionsAsync()
    {
        _loading = true;
        StateHasChanged();
        try
        {
            var cols = await MongoSvc.GetCollectionsAsync(Environment, _selectedDb, _cts.Token);
            _all = cols.ToList();
            ApplyFilter();
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) { }
        finally { _loading = false; }
    }

    private void OnFilterChanged(string text)
    {
        _filterText = text;
        _filterParseError = null;
        FilterNode? node = null;
        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(text))
        {
            try   { node = Parser.Parse(text); }
            catch (FilterParseException ex) { _filterParseError = ex.Message; }
        }
        _filtered = node is null
            ? _all
            : _all.Where(c => FilterEvaluator.Evaluate(node, c)).ToList();
        _page = 1;
        RebuildPage();
    }

    private void ApplyFilter() => OnFilterChanged(_filterText);

    private void RebuildPage()
    {
        _totalPages = Math.Max(1, (int)Math.Ceiling(_filtered.Count / (double)_pageSize));
        _page       = Math.Clamp(_page, 1, _totalPages);
        _paged      = _filtered.Skip((_page - 1) * _pageSize).Take(_pageSize).ToList();
    }

    private void OnPageChanged(int p) { _page = p; RebuildPage(); }
    private void OnPageSizeChanged(int s) { _pageSize = s; _page = 1; RebuildPage(); }

    private void OpenInspector(string collection)
        => TabService.OpenOrFocus(TabModel.CreateMongoCollectionInspector(_selectedDb, collection, Environment));

    private async Task ShowInfoAsync(MongoCollectionSummary col)
    {
        var parameters = new DialogParameters<MongoCollectionInfoDialog>
        {
            { x => x.Collection,  col          },
            { x => x.Database,    _selectedDb  },
            { x => x.Environment, Environment  },
        };
        await DialogService.ShowAsync<MongoCollectionInfoDialog>(col.Name, parameters,
            new DialogOptions { MaxWidth = MaxWidth.Medium, FullWidth = false });
    }

    private async Task<bool> ConfirmAsync(string message, string confirmText = "Delete")
    {
        var dialog = await DialogService.ShowAsync<ConfirmDialog>("Confirm", new DialogParameters<ConfirmDialog>
        {
            { x => x.Message,     message     },
            { x => x.ConfirmText, confirmText },
        }, new DialogOptions { MaxWidth = MaxWidth.ExtraSmall });
        var result = await dialog.Result;
        return result is { Canceled: false };
    }

    private async Task DeleteCollectionAsync(string collection)
    {
        if (!await ConfirmAsync($"Drop \"{collection}\" from {_selectedDb}? This cannot be undone.")) return;
        await MongoSvc.DropCollectionAsync(Environment, _selectedDb, collection, _cts.Token);
        Snackbar.Add($"Collection \"{collection}\" dropped.", Severity.Success);
        await LoadCollectionsAsync();
    }

    private static string FormatBytes(long b) => b switch
    {
        < 1024               => $"{b} B",
        < 1024 * 1024        => $"{b / 1024} KB",
        < 1024L * 1024 * 1024 => $"{b / (1024 * 1024)} MB",
        _                    => $"{b / (1024L * 1024 * 1024)} GB",
    };

    public void Dispose() => _cts.Cancel();
}

        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Environment))
        {
            <MudText Typo="Typo.body2" Class="bm-muted">@Environment</MudText>
        }
        <MudText Typo="Typo.body2" Class="bm-muted mt-2">
            Implemented in a future step.
        </MudText>
    </div>
</div>

    [Parameter, EditorRequired] public string Icon        { get; set; } = Icons.Material.Outlined.Dashboard;
    [Parameter]                 public string Environment { get; set; } = string.Empty;

FILE src/NxtUI.Web/Pages/RunDetail.razor
LENGTH 16558
@using NxtUI.Models
@inject IRunService RunService
@inject TabService TabService
@inject SignalRConnectionService SignalR
@inject IJSRuntime JS
@implements IDisposable

@code {
    [Parameter, EditorRequired] public string? RunId { get; set; }
    [Parameter, EditorRequired] public string Environment { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    [Parameter, EditorRequired] public TabModel? Tab { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public bool IsFocused { get; set; }

    private bool _previousIsFocused;
    private bool _allowNextRender = true;

    // ── Data ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    private RunDetails? _details;
    private bool _loading = true;

    private PerformanceEventService? _eventService;
    private TopologyComputationService? _topologyService;
    private CancellationTokenSource? _topologyDebounce;
    private const int TopologyDebounceMs = 400;

    // ── Topology (live and replay) ────────────────────────────────────────
    private Topology? _topology;
    private int _eventCount;

    // ── Replay mode (Step 8) ─────────────────────────────────────────────
    private DateTime? _replayTimestamp;
    private bool IsReplay => _replayTimestamp.HasValue;

    // Slider uses 0–1000 integer steps; converted to/from timestamps internally.
    private DateTime _sliderMin;
    private DateTime _sliderMax;
    private double   _sliderValue;   // 0–1000
    private const double SliderSteps = 1000.0;

    // ── UI ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    private bool _detailsExpanded;
    private string LocalStorageKey => "bm_run_details_strip_expanded";

    // ── Lifecycle ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        _previousIsFocused = IsFocused;
        _topologyService   = new TopologyComputationService();

        try
        {
            var stored = await JS.InvokeAsync<string?>("localStorage.getItem", LocalStorageKey);
            _detailsExpanded = stored == "true";
        }
        catch { }

        await LoadAsync();
    }

    protected override void OnParametersSet()
    {
        if (IsFocused == _previousIsFocused) return;

        var gained = IsFocused && !_previousIsFocused;
        var lost   = !IsFocused && _previousIsFocused;
        _previousIsFocused = IsFocused;

        if (_eventService is not null) _eventService.IsFocused = IsFocused;

        if (gained)      StateHasChanged();
        else if (lost) { _allowNextRender = true; StateHasChanged(); }
    }

    protected override bool ShouldRender()
    {
        if (IsFocused) return true;
        if (_allowNextRender) { _allowNextRender = false; return true; }
        return false;
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        _loading = true;
        StateHasChanged();
        try
        {
            _details = await RunService.GetRunDetailsAsync(Environment, RunId ?? string.Empty);
            if (_details is not null && RunId is not null)
                await StartEventServiceAsync();
        }
        catch { _details = null; }
        finally { _loading = false; StateHasChanged(); }
    }

    private async Task StartEventServiceAsync()
    {
        if (_details is null || RunId is null) return;

        _eventService = new PerformanceEventService(RunService);

        await _eventService.StartAsync(
            env:            Environment,
            runId:          RunId,
            startTime: _details.Start,
            isRunning:      _details.Status == RunStatus.Running,
            isFocused:      IsFocused,
            onEventsUpdated: DebouncedTopologyCompute,
            signalR:        SignalR);
    }

    private void DebouncedTopologyCompute()
    {
        _topologyDebounce?.Cancel();
        _topologyDebounce?.Dispose();
        _topologyDebounce = new CancellationTokenSource();
        var token = _topologyDebounce.Token;

        _ = Task.Delay(TopologyDebounceMs, token).ContinueWith(async _ =>
        {
            if (token.IsCancellationRequested) return;
            try
            {
                if (_eventService is null || _topologyService is null) return;

                var allEvents = _eventService.Events;

                IReadOnlyDictionary<string, PerformanceEvent> filtered = _replayTimestamp.HasValue
                    ? allEvents.Where(kv => kv.Value.Start <= _replayTimestamp.Value)
                               .ToDictionary(kv => kv.Key, kv => kv.Value)
                    : allEvents;

                _topology   = _topologyService.ComputeTopology(filtered);
                _eventCount = _eventService.EventCount;

                UpdateSliderRange(allEvents.Values);

                await InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged);
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Console.WriteLine($"[RunDetail] Topology compute error: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }, TaskScheduler.Default);
    }

    // ── Slider & Replay ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private void UpdateSliderRange(IEnumerable<PerformanceEvent> events)
    {
        var list = events.ToList();
        if (list.Count == 0) return;

        _sliderMin = list.Min(e => e.Start);
        _sliderMax = list.Max(e => e.Finish ?? e.Start);

        // In LIVE mode keep the thumb at the right edge.
        if (!IsReplay) _sliderValue = SliderSteps;
    }

    // Convert 0–1000 slider position to a DateTime within [_sliderMin, _sliderMax].
    private DateTime SliderToDateTime(double value)
    {
        if (_sliderMax <= _sliderMin) return _sliderMax;
        var fraction = Math.Clamp(value / SliderSteps, 0.0, 1.0);
        var totalMs  = (_sliderMax - _sliderMin).TotalMilliseconds;
        return _sliderMin.AddMilliseconds(fraction * totalMs);
    }

    private void OnSliderChanged(double value)
    {
        _sliderValue = value;

        // Snap to LIVE when dragged to/past the right edge.
        if (value >= SliderSteps - 1)
        {
            EnterLiveMode();
            return;
        }

        _replayTimestamp = SliderToDateTime(value);
        DebouncedTopologyCompute();
    }

    private void EnterLiveMode()
    {
        _replayTimestamp = null;
        _sliderValue     = SliderSteps;
        DebouncedTopologyCompute();
    }

    private void EnterReplayMode()
    {
        if (_sliderMax <= _sliderMin) return;
        _sliderValue     = SliderSteps * 0.75;
        _replayTimestamp = SliderToDateTime(_sliderValue);
        DebouncedTopologyCompute();
    }

    private string FormatSliderTime()
    {
        if (!IsReplay || _replayTimestamp is null) return "LIVE";
        var ts = _replayTimestamp.Value.ToLocalTime();
        return ts.ToString("HH:mm:ss");
    }

    // ── Top bar helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private RunStatus EffectiveStatus => _details?.Status ?? RunStatus.Unknown;
    private int DoneCount       => _topology?.TotalDone       ?? 0;
    private int InProgressCount => _topology?.TotalInProgress ?? 0;
    private int ProgressPercent => _topology is null ? 0 : (int)Math.Round(_topology.EstimatedProgress * 100);
    private Color ProgressColor => EffectiveStatus switch
    {
        RunStatus.Running => Color.Success,
        RunStatus.Failed  => Color.Error,
        _                   => Color.Default
    };

    private async Task ToggleDetailsStrip()
    {
        _detailsExpanded = !_detailsExpanded;
        try { await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("localStorage.setItem", LocalStorageKey, _detailsExpanded.ToString().ToLower()); }
        catch { }
    }

    private async Task CancelRunAsync()
    {
        if (RunId is null) return;
        if (await RunService.CancelRunAsync(Environment, RunId)) await LoadAsync();
    }

    private void OpenTimeline()
    {
        if (RunId is null) return;
        TabService.OpenOrFocus(TabModel.CreateTimeline(RunId, Environment));
    }

    // ── Dispose ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    public void Dispose()
    {
        _eventService?.Dispose();
        _topologyDebounce?.Cancel();
        _topologyDebounce?.Dispose();
    }

    private static string FormatDuration(TimeSpan ts) =>
        ts.TotalHours >= 1
            ? $"{(int)ts.TotalHours:D2}:{ts.Minutes:D2}:{ts.Seconds:D2}"
            : $"{ts.Minutes:D2}:{ts.Seconds:D2}";
}

<div class="bm-page-fill bm-batch-detail">

    <!-- ── Top bar ── -->
    <div class="bm-detail-topbar @(_loading ? "loading" : "")">
        <div class="bm-detail-topbar-left">
            <span class="bm-status-chip-dot bm-status-@(EffectiveStatus.ToString().ToLower())"></span>

            }
            else

                        <div class="bm-details-key">RunId</div>
                        <div class="bm-details-value bm-monospace">@_details.RunId</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="bm-details-row">
                        <div class="bm-details-key">Type</div>
                        <div class="bm-details-value">@_details.Type</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="bm-details-row">
                        <div class="bm-details-key">Start</div>
                        <div class="bm-details-value">@_details.Start.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss") UTC</div>
                    </div>

                        <div class="bm-details-key">Duration</div>
                        <div class="bm-details-value">@FormatDuration(_details.Duration)</div>
                    </div>
                    @foreach (var kv in _details.Metadata)

        @if (_loading)
        {
            <div class="bm-graph-overlay"><div class="bm-graph-loading">Loading…</div></div>
        }
        else if (_topology == null || _topology.Nodes.Count == 0)
        {

        }
    </div>

    <!-- ── Timeline slider (Step 8) ── -->
    <div class="bm-batch-detail-footer">
        <div class="bm-slider-row">

            {

                       Min="0.0" Max="@SliderSteps"

            <span class="bm-slider-count bm-muted">@_eventCount events</span>
        </div>
    </div>

@using NxtUI.Filtering

@code {
    [Parameter, EditorRequired] public string Environment { get; set; } = string.Empty;

    private int _page     = 1;
    private int _pageSize = 25;
    private bool _loading = false;
    private string  _filterText       = string.Empty;
    private string? _filterParseError = null;

    private static readonly string[] RunSearchableFields = ["Name", "RunId", "Type", "Status"];
    private static readonly FilterParser RunFilterParser   = new(RunSearchableFields);

    private static readonly (string Aliases, string Label)[] _runFieldHints =
    [
        ("name", "run name"),
        ("run / runid",     "run identifier"),
        ("type",            "run type"),
        ("status",          "Running / Completed / Failed"),
    ];

    private List<RunSummary> _all      = new();
    private List<RunSummary> _filtered = new();
    private List<RunSummary> _paged    = new();
    private int _totalPages => Math.Max(1, (int)Math.Ceiling((double)_filtered.Count / _pageSize));

    private CancellationTokenSource _cts = new();

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync() =>
        await LoadAsync();

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        _loading = true;
        StateHasChanged();
        try
        {
            _all = await RunService.GetRunsAsync(
                Environment, DateTime.UtcNow, 200, ct: _cts.Token);
            ApplyFilter();
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) { }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            Snackbar.Add($"Failed to load runs: {ex.Message}", Severity.Error);
        }
        finally
        {
            _loading = false;
        }
    }

    private void OnFilterChanged(string text)
    {
        _filterText = text;
        _filterParseError = null;

        FilterNode? node = null;
        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(text))
        {
            try   { node = RunFilterParser.Parse(text); }
            catch (FilterParseException ex) { _filterParseError = ex.Message; }
        }

        _filtered = node is null
            ? _all
            : _all.Where(b => FilterEvaluator.Evaluate(node, b)).ToList();

        _page = 1;
        RebuildPage();
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    private void ApplyFilter() => OnFilterChanged(_filterText);

    private void RebuildPage() =>
        _paged = _filtered.Skip((_page - 1) * _pageSize).Take(_pageSize).ToList();

    private void OnPageChanged(int page) { _page = page; RebuildPage(); }

    private void OnPageSizeChanged(int size) { _pageSize = size; _page = 1; RebuildPage(); }

    private async Task RefreshAsync()
    {
        _filterText       = string.Empty;
        _filterParseError = null;
        await LoadAsync();
        Snackbar.Add("Refreshed", Severity.Normal, c => c.VisibleStateDuration = 1500);
    }

    private void OpenDetail(RunSummary b) =>
        TabService.OpenOrFocus(TabModel.CreateRunDetail(b.RunId, b.Name, Environment));

    private void OpenTimeline(RunSummary b) =>
        TabService.OpenOrFocus(TabModel.CreateTimeline(b.RunId, Environment));

    private async Task StopRunAsync(RunSummary b)
    {
        var ok = await RunService.CancelRunAsync(Environment, b.RunId, _cts.Token);
        if (ok)
        {
            Snackbar.Add($"Stop requested for {b.Name}", Severity.Warning);
            await LoadAsync();
        }
        else
            Snackbar.Add("Could not stop run", Severity.Error);
    }

    private static string FormatDuration(TimeSpan ts) =>
        ts.TotalHours >= 1
            ? $"{(int)ts.TotalHours:D2}:{ts.Minutes:D2}:{ts.Seconds:D2}"
            : $"{ts.Minutes:D2}:{ts.Seconds:D2}";

    public void Dispose() => _cts.Cancel();
}

﻿@using NxtUI.Models
@using NxtUI.Services
@using NxtUI.Filtering
@inject IHeartbeatService HeartbeatSvc
@inject ILogPathDiscoveryService DiscoverySvc
@inject IServiceMetricsMonitor MetricsMonitor
@inject TabService TabService
@inject ISnackbar Snackbar
@inject IJSRuntime JS
@implements IAsyncDisposable

<div class="bm-page bm-page-fill">

    <!-- ── Toolbar: filter + view toggle + refresh ──────────────────── -->
    <div class="bm-batch-toolbar">

        <div class="bm-svc-toolbar-left">
            <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Memory"
                           Size="Size.Small"
                           title="Memory graph"
                           OnClick="OpenMemoryGraph" />

            <MudTooltip Text="@(_graphView ? "Table view" : "Card view")">
                <MudToggleIconButton @bind-Toggled="_graphView"
                                     Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.GridView"
                                     ToggledIcon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.TableRows"
                                     Size="Size.Small" />
            </MudTooltip>

            @* Grouping only applies to the card view *@
            @if (_graphView)
            {
                <span class="bm-svc-grouping-label">Grouping</span>
                <MudButtonGroup Size="Size.Small" Variant="Variant.Outlined" Class="bm-svc-group-toggle">
                    <MudButton Class="@(_groupBy == "None"        ? "bm-view-btn-active" : "bm-view-btn-inactive")" OnClick='@(() => OnGroupByChanged("None"))'>None</MudButton>
                    <MudButton Class="@(_groupBy == "ServiceName" ? "bm-view-btn-active" : "bm-view-btn-inactive")" OnClick='@(() => OnGroupByChanged("ServiceName"))'>Service</MudButton>
                    <MudButton Class="@(_groupBy == "HostName"    ? "bm-view-btn-active" : "bm-view-btn-inactive")" OnClick='@(() => OnGroupByChanged("HostName"))'>Host</MudButton>
                </MudButtonGroup>
            }

            <FilterBox Value="@_filterText"
                       OnFilterChanged="OnFilterChanged"
                       ParseError="@_filterParseError"
                       Placeholder="Filter services…"
                       Class="bm-filter-input"
                       FieldHints="@_fieldHints" />
        </div>

        <div class="bm-svc-toolbar-right">
            <MudTooltip Text="Refresh">
                <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Refresh"
                               Size="Size.Small"
                               OnClick="RefreshAsync"
                               Class="bm-refresh-btn" />
            </MudTooltip>

            @if (_lastUpdated.HasValue)
            {
                <span class="bm-toolbar-hint">Updated @_lastUpdated.Value.ToLocalTime().ToString("HH:mm:ss")</span>
            }
        </div>

    </div>

    <!-- ── Content ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="bm-table-wrap">
        @if (_loading && _all.Count == 0)
        {
            <MudProgressLinear Indeterminate="true" Color="Color.Primary" Class="bm-loading-bar" />
        }

        @if (_graphView)
        {
            <!-- Card view — grouping supported (pure Blazor, no JS conflict).
                 The container is @key'd by the grouping mode: switching grouping
                 moves cards between *different* parent card-rows, and Blazor's
                 @key only reconciles within one parent — a cross-parent move makes
                 it compute insertBefore against a node whose parent is already
                 detached (null). Re-keying the container forces a full teardown +
                 rebuild on grouping change, so no card is ever diffed across
                 parents. Within a grouping mode the key is stable, so polling
                 updates still diff cards in place by their per-card @key. -->
            <div class="bm-svc-cards" @key="@($"groupmode:{_groupBy}")">
                @foreach (var group in GetGroups(_filtered))
                {
                    <div class="bm-svc-group" @key="@(group.Key ?? "__ungrouped__")">
                        @if (group.Key != null)
                        {
                            <div class="bm-svc-group-header">@group.Key</div>
                        }
                        <div class="bm-svc-card-row">
                            @foreach (var s in group)
                            {
                                var cardKey      = ServiceKey(s);
                                var cardPath     = DiscoverySvc.GetCachedPath(s, Env);
                                var cardSearching = DiscoverySvc.IsSearching(s, Env);
                                var spark = BuildSparkData(s, cardKey);
                                <div @key="@cardKey"
                                     class="@($"bm-svc-card {(s.IsOnline ? "bm-svc-online" : "bm-svc-offline")} {(cardSearching ? "bm-svc-searching" : "")}")"
                                     @ondblclick="@(() => OpenLogViewerAsync(s))"
                                     @onclick="@(async (MouseEventArgs e) => { if (e.CtrlKey) await CopyPathAsync(s); })">
                                    @if (spark is not null)
                                    {
                                        @spark.Svg
                                    }
                                    <div class="bm-svc-card-header">
                                        <MudIcon Icon="@(s.IsOnline ? Icons.Material.Filled.Circle : Icons.Material.Outlined.Circle)"
                                                 Size="Size.Small"
                                                 Color="@(s.IsOnline ? Color.Success : Color.Error)"
                                                 Class="bm-svc-dot" />
                                        <span class="bm-svc-card-name">@s.ServiceName</span>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="bm-svc-card-host">@s.HostName</div>
                                    <div class="bm-svc-card-meta">
                                        <span>PID @s.ProcessId</span>
                                        @if (s.RamMb is not null || s.PeakMb is not null)
                                        {
                                            <span>Mem. <span class="@RamColorClass(s.RamMb)">@FormatMb(s.RamMb)</span><span class="bm-muted" style="margin-left:5px">@FormatMb(s.PeakMb)</span></span>
                                        }
                                        <span>@FormatAge(s.UpdatedDateTime)</span>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            }
                        </div>
                    </div>
                }
            </div>
        }
        else
        {
            <!-- Table view — usual style, sortable, paginated (no grouping) -->
            <MudTable T="ServiceStatus"
                      Items="@_paged"
                      Dense="true"
                      Hover="true"
                      Elevation="0"
                      Class="bm-batch-table"
                      FixedHeader="true"
                      Height="100%"
                      RowClassFunc="@((svc, _) => DiscoverySvc.IsSearching(svc, Env) ? "bm-row-searching" : string.Empty)">
                <HeaderContent>
                    <MudTh Style="width:36px;"></MudTh>
                    <MudTh>
                        <MudTableSortLabel T="ServiceStatus" SortBy="@(s => s.ServiceName)">Service</MudTableSortLabel>
                    </MudTh>
                    <MudTh>
                        <MudTableSortLabel T="ServiceStatus" SortBy="@(s => s.HostName)">Host</MudTableSortLabel>
                    </MudTh>
                    <MudTh>
                        <MudTableSortLabel T="ServiceStatus" SortBy="@(s => s.ProcessId)">PID</MudTableSortLabel>
                    </MudTh>
                    <MudTh>
                        <MudTableSortLabel T="ServiceStatus" SortBy="@(s => s.UpdatedDateTime)">Last Heartbeat</MudTableSortLabel>
                    </MudTh>
                    <MudTh>
                        <MudTableSortLabel T="ServiceStatus" SortBy="@(s => s.CreatedDateTime)"
                                           InitialDirection="SortDirection.Descending">Started (UTC)</MudTableSortLabel>
                    </MudTh>
                    <MudTh Style="text-align:right;">
                        <MudTableSortLabel T="ServiceStatus" SortBy="@(s => s.RamMb ?? 0)">RAM (MB)</MudTableSortLabel>
                    </MudTh>
                    <MudTh Style="text-align:right;">
                        <MudTableSortLabel T="ServiceStatus" SortBy="@(s => s.PeakMb ?? 0)">Peak (MB)</MudTableSortLabel>
                    </MudTh>
                    <MudTh Style="width:80px; text-align:center;">Actions</MudTh>
                </HeaderContent>
                <RowTemplate>
                    @{
                        var rowKey  = ServiceKey(context);
                        var rowPath = DiscoverySvc.GetCachedPath(context, Env);
                    }
                    <MudTd Style="padding-left:12px;" @ondblclick="@(() => OpenLogViewerAsync(context))">
                        <MudIcon Icon="@(context.IsOnline ? Icons.Material.Filled.Circle : Icons.Material.Outlined.Circle)"
                                 Size="Size.Small"
                                 Color="@(context.IsOnline ? Color.Success : Color.Error)" />
                    </MudTd>
                    <MudTd DataLabel="Service" @ondblclick="@(() => OpenLogViewerAsync(context))"><MudText Typo="Typo.body2">@context.ServiceName</MudText></MudTd>
                    <MudTd DataLabel="Host" @ondblclick="@(() => OpenLogViewerAsync(context))"><MudText Typo="Typo.body2" Class="bm-monospace bm-muted">@context.HostName</MudText></MudTd>
                    <MudTd DataLabel="PID" @ondblclick="@(() => OpenLogViewerAsync(context))"><MudText Typo="Typo.body2" Class="bm-monospace bm-muted">@context.ProcessId</MudText></MudTd>
                    <MudTd DataLabel="Last Heartbeat" data-value="@context.UpdatedDateTime.ToLocalTime().ToString("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")" @ondblclick="@(() => OpenLogViewerAsync(context))"><MudText Typo="Typo.body2">@FormatAge(context.UpdatedDateTime)</MudText></MudTd>
                    <MudTd DataLabel="Started" @ondblclick="@(() => OpenLogViewerAsync(context))"><MudText Typo="Typo.body2" Class="bm-monospace bm-muted">@context.CreatedDateTime.ToLocalTime().ToString("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")</MudText></MudTd>
                    <MudTd DataLabel="RAM (MB)" Style="text-align:right;" data-value="@(context.RamMb?.ToString("F2") ?? "")" @ondblclick="@(() => OpenLogViewerAsync(context))">
                        <MudText Typo="Typo.body2" Class="@($"bm-monospace {RamColorClass(context.RamMb)}")">@FormatMb(context.RamMb)</MudText>
                    </MudTd>
                    <MudTd DataLabel="Peak (MB)" Style="text-align:right;" data-value="@(context.PeakMb?.ToString("F2") ?? "")" @ondblclick="@(() => OpenLogViewerAsync(context))">
                        <MudText Typo="Typo.body2" Class="bm-monospace bm-muted">@FormatMb(context.PeakMb)</MudText>
                    </MudTd>
                    <MudTd Style="text-align:center;">
                        <div class="bm-row-actions">
                            <MudTooltip Text="@(rowPath != null ? $"Copy: {rowPath}" : "Copy log path")">
                                <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.FolderOpen"
                                               Size="Size.Small"
                                               Color="@(rowPath != null ? Color.Default : Color.Inherit)"
                                               Disabled="@_copyingFor.Contains(rowKey)"
                                               OnClick="@(() => CopyPathAsync(context))" />
                            </MudTooltip>
                            <MudTooltip Text="Open log viewer">
                                <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Article"
                                               Size="Size.Small"
                                               Color="@(rowPath != null ? Color.Default : Color.Inherit)"
                                               Disabled="@_openingLogFor.Contains(rowKey)"
                                               OnClick="@(() => OpenLogViewerAsync(context))" />
                            </MudTooltip>
                        </div>
                    </MudTd>
                </RowTemplate>
            </MudTable>
        }
    </div>

    <!-- ── Footer: count + pagination (table view) ───────────────────── -->
    <div class="bm-batch-footer">
        <MudText Typo="Typo.body2" Class="bm-muted bm-footer-count">
            @_filtered.Count results
        </MudText>

        @if (!_graphView)
        {
            <MudPagination Count="@_totalPages"
                           Selected="@_page"
                           SelectedChanged="OnPageChanged"
                           ShowFirstButton="true"
                           ShowLastButton="true"
                           Size="Size.Small"
                           Class="bm-pagination-ctrl" />

            <div class="bm-rows-select">
                <MudText Typo="Typo.body2" Class="bm-muted" Style="white-space:nowrap;">Rows:</MudText>
                <MudSelect T="int"
                           Value="@_pageSize"
                           ValueChanged="OnPageSizeChanged"
                           Dense="true"
                           Variant="Variant.Outlined"
                           Margin="Margin.Dense"
                           Style="width:68px">
                    <MudSelectItem Value="10">10</MudSelectItem>
                    <MudSelectItem Value="25">25</MudSelectItem>
                    <MudSelectItem Value="50">50</MudSelectItem>
                    <MudSelectItem Value="100">100</MudSelectItem>
                </MudSelect>
            </div>
        }
    </div>

</div>

@code {
    [Parameter] public string Env { get; set; } = string.Empty;

    private int  _page     = 1;
    private int  _pageSize = 25;
    private bool _loading  = false;
    private string  _filterText       = string.Empty;
    private string? _filterParseError = null;
    private string  _groupBy          = "None";
    private bool    _graphView        = true;
    private DateTime? _lastUpdated;

    private static readonly string[] SearchableFields = ["ServiceName", "HostName", "ProcessId"];
    private static readonly FilterParser SvcFilterParser = new(
        searchableFields: SearchableFields,
        aliases: new Dictionary<string, string>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
        {
            ["svcname"]     = "ServiceName",
            ["servicename"] = "ServiceName",
            ["host"]        = "HostName",
            ["hostname"]    = "HostName",
            ["pid"]         = "ProcessId",
            ["processid"]   = "ProcessId",
            ["ram"]         = "RamMb",
            ["mem"]         = "RamMb",
            ["peak"]        = "PeakMb",
            ["updated"]     = "UpdatedDateTime",
            ["update"]      = "UpdatedDateTime",
        });

    private static readonly (string Aliases, string Label)[] _fieldHints =
    [
        ("svcname / servicename", "service name"),
        ("host / hostname",       "host name"),
        ("pid / processid",       "process ID"),
        ("ram / mem",             "current RAM in MB (e.g. ram:>500)"),
        ("peak",                  "peak RAM in MB (e.g. peak:>1000)"),
        ("updated",               "last heartbeat timestamp (e.g. updated:>-10m  →  online in last 10 min)"),
    ];

    private List<ServiceStatus> _all      = new();
    private List<ServiceStatus> _filtered = new();
    private List<ServiceStatus> _paged    = new();
    private int _totalPages => Math.Max(1, (int)Math.Ceiling((double)_filtered.Count / _pageSize));

    // Keys currently awaiting a path search triggered by the copy/open actions
    private readonly HashSet<string> _copyingFor    = new();
    private readonly HashSet<string> _openingLogFor = new();

    private PeriodicTimer? _timer;

    // Coalesce path-resolved notifications: discovery can resolve many services in
    // a burst (e.g. on first load), and one StateHasChanged per resolution renders
    // the grid several times while the previous batch is still being applied on the
    // client — that render storm corrupts the DOM diff (insertBefore on null parent).
    private readonly object _renderGate = new();
    private bool _renderScheduled;
    private bool _disposed;

    // Held for the lifetime of this tab; disposing it tells the monitor this env
    // has one fewer subscriber (monitoring stops when the last tab for env closes).
    private IDisposable? _metricsSubscription;

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        DiscoverySvc.OnPathResolved += OnPathResolved;
        MetricsMonitor.OnMetricsUpdated += OnMetricsUpdated;
        _metricsSubscription = MetricsMonitor.Subscribe(Env);
        await LoadAsync();
        _ = StartPollingAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        _loading = true;
        await InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged);
        try
        {
            _all         = await HeartbeatSvc.GetServiceStatusesAsync(Env);
            _lastUpdated = DateTime.UtcNow;
            RecomputeFilter();

            // Kick off background path discovery for any service not yet in cache
            foreach (var svc in _all)
                DiscoverySvc.EnsureDiscovering(svc, Env);
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            Snackbar.Add($"Failed to load services: {ex.Message}", Severity.Error);
        }
        finally
        {
            _loading = false;
            // Always marshal renders onto the circuit's sync context — the poll
            // timer continuation may resume off-context, and a background-thread
            // render races the UI and corrupts the DOM (insertBefore/removeChild null).
            await InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged);
        }
    }

    private async Task StartPollingAsync()
    {
        _timer = new PeriodicTimer(TimeSpan.FromSeconds(15));
        while (await _timer.WaitForNextTickAsync())
            await LoadAsync();
    }

    // ── Path discovery ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private void OnPathResolved(string key) => ScheduleRender();

    // Only react to updates for this tab's environment.
    private void OnMetricsUpdated(string env)
    {
        if (env == Env) ScheduleRender();
    }

    private void ScheduleRender()
    {
        // Debounce: collapse a burst of notifications into a single re-render.
        lock (_renderGate)
        {
            if (_renderScheduled || _disposed) return;
            _renderScheduled = true;
        }
        _ = DebouncedRenderAsync();
    }

    private async Task DebouncedRenderAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            await Task.Delay(400);
            lock (_renderGate) { _renderScheduled = false; }
            if (!_disposed)
                await InvokeAsync(() =>
                {
                    // Re-stamp + re-filter so RAM/Peak columns and any ram/peak
                    // filter react to new samples; keep the user's current page.
                    RecomputeFilter(resetPage: false);
                    StateHasChanged();
                });
        }
        catch (ObjectDisposedException)   { }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException)   { }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) { }
    }

    private async Task CopyPathAsync(ServiceStatus svc)
    {
        var key = ServiceKey(svc);
        if (_copyingFor.Contains(key)) return;

        var path = DiscoverySvc.GetCachedPath(svc, Env);

        if (path is null)
        {
            // Either still searching or not yet found — trigger immediate search
            _copyingFor.Add(key);
            StateHasChanged();
            try   { path = await DiscoverySvc.FindNowAsync(svc, Env); }
            finally
            {
                _copyingFor.Remove(key);
                StateHasChanged();
            }
        }

        if (path is null)
        {
            Snackbar.Add("Log path not found", Severity.Warning);
            return;
        }

        await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("copyText", path);
        await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("showCopyToast", "Path copied to clipboard");
    }

    private async Task OpenLogViewerAsync(ServiceStatus svc)
    {
        var key  = ServiceKey(svc);
        if (_openingLogFor.Contains(key)) return;

        var path = DiscoverySvc.GetCachedPath(svc, Env);

        if (path is null)
        {
            _openingLogFor.Add(key);
            StateHasChanged();
            try   { path = await DiscoverySvc.FindNowAsync(svc, Env); }
            finally
            {
                _openingLogFor.Remove(key);
                StateHasChanged();
            }
        }

        if (path is null)
        {
            Snackbar.Add("Log path not found", Severity.Warning);
            return;
        }

        var tab = TabModel.CreateLogsDashboard(Env);
        tab.NavigationHint = path;
        TabService.OpenOrFocus(tab);
    }

    private string ServiceKey(ServiceStatus s) =>
        LogPathDiscoveryService.CacheKey(s, Env);

    // ── Filter / pagination ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private void OnFilterChanged(string text)
    {
        _filterText = text;
        RecomputeFilter();
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    // Pure computation, no render — callable from the poll path without forcing
    // an off-context StateHasChanged. LoadAsync renders via InvokeAsync instead.
    // resetPage=false keeps the current page (used by metrics-driven refreshes so
    // a 90s update doesn't yank the user back to page 1).
    private void RecomputeFilter(bool resetPage = true)
    {
        StampMetrics();

        _filterParseError = null;

        FilterNode? node = null;
        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_filterText))
        {
            try   { node = SvcFilterParser.Parse(_filterText); }
            catch (FilterParseException ex) { _filterParseError = ex.Message; }
        }

        _filtered = node is null
            ? _all
            : _all.Where(s => FilterEvaluator.Evaluate(node, s)).ToList();

        _page = resetPage ? 1 : Math.Clamp(_page, 1, _totalPages);
        RebuildPage();
    }

    // Stamp the latest metrics (in MB) onto each row so display, sort and filter
    // all read the same value. Null when no sample has been parsed yet.
    private void StampMetrics()
    {
        foreach (var s in _all)
        {
            var m = MetricsMonitor.GetLatest(Env, s);
            s.RamMb  = m is null ? null : m.TotalCurrentBytes / (1024d * 1024d);
            s.PeakMb = m is null ? null : m.TotalPeakBytes    / (1024d * 1024d);
        }
    }

    private void RebuildPage() =>
        _paged = _filtered.Skip((_page - 1) * _pageSize).Take(_pageSize).ToList();

    private void OnPageChanged(int page)  { _page = page; RebuildPage(); }
    private void OnPageSizeChanged(int s) { _pageSize = s; _page = 1; RebuildPage(); }

    private void OpenMemoryGraph() =>
        TabService.OpenOrFocus(TabModel.CreateMemoryGraph(Env));

    private void OnGroupByChanged(string value) => _groupBy = value;

    private async Task RefreshAsync()
    {
        _filterText       = string.Empty;
        _filterParseError = null;
        await LoadAsync();
        Snackbar.Add("Refreshed", Severity.Normal, c => c.VisibleStateDuration = 1500);
    }

    private IEnumerable<IGrouping<string?, ServiceStatus>> GetGroups(List<ServiceStatus> rows) =>
        _groupBy switch
        {
            "ServiceName" => rows.GroupBy(s => (string?)s.ServiceName),
            "HostName"    => rows.GroupBy(s => (string?)s.HostName),
            _             => rows.GroupBy(_ => (string?)null),
        };

    private static string FormatAge(DateTime updatedUtc)
    {
        var age = DateTime.UtcNow - updatedUtc;
        if (age.TotalSeconds < 60)  return $"{(int)age.TotalSeconds}s ago";
        if (age.TotalMinutes < 60)  return $"{(int)age.TotalMinutes}m ago";
        return updatedUtc.ToLocalTime().ToString("HH:mm:ss");
    }

    private record SparkData(MarkupString Svg);

    private SparkData? BuildSparkData(ServiceStatus s, string cardKey)
    {
        var history = MetricsMonitor.GetHistory(Env, s);
        if (history.Count < 2) return null;

        var cutoff = DateTime.UtcNow.AddHours(-6);
        var window = history.Where(m => m.Timestamp >= cutoff).ToList();
        if (window.Count < 2) return null;

        var tMin  = window[0].Timestamp;
        var tMax  = window[^1].Timestamp;
        var tSpan = (tMax - tMin).Ticks;
        if (tSpan == 0) return null;

        var vMax = window.Max(m => m.TotalCurrentBytes);
        if (vMax == 0) return null;

        const int W = 100, H = 40;

        // Area path
        var path = new System.Text.StringBuilder("M0,40");
        foreach (var m in window)
        {
            var x = (m.Timestamp - tMin).Ticks / (double)tSpan * W;
            var y = H - (double)m.TotalCurrentBytes / vMax * H;
            path.Append(System.FormattableString.Invariant($" L{x:F1},{y:F1}"));
        }
        path.Append(" L100,40 Z");

        // Hour-boundary X positions
        var firstHour = new DateTime(tMin.Year, tMin.Month, tMin.Day, tMin.Hour, 0, 0, DateTimeKind.Utc).AddHours(1);
        var lines     = new System.Text.StringBuilder();
        for (var h = firstHour; h < tMax; h = h.AddHours(1))
        {
            var hx = (h - tMin).Ticks / (double)tSpan * W;
            lines.Append(System.FormattableString.Invariant(
                $"<line x1=\"{hx:F1}\" y1=\"0\" x2=\"{hx:F1}\" y2=\"40\" stroke=\"rgba(30,100,200,0.20)\" stroke-width=\"1\" vector-effect=\"non-scaling-stroke\"/>"));
        }

        // Tooltip JSON [[unixSec, ramMb, peakMb], ...] — no quotes, safe in HTML attribute
        var json = new System.Text.StringBuilder("[");
        for (int i = 0; i < window.Count; i++)
        {
            if (i > 0) json.Append(',');
            var sec    = new DateTimeOffset(window[i].Timestamp, TimeSpan.Zero).ToUnixTimeSeconds();
            var ramMb  = window[i].TotalCurrentBytes / (1024.0 * 1024.0);
            var peakMb = window[i].TotalPeakBytes    / (1024.0 * 1024.0);
            json.Append(System.FormattableString.Invariant($"[{sec},{ramMb:F1},{peakMb:F1}]"));
        }
        json.Append(']');

        var gradId  = $"sg{(uint)cardKey.GetHashCode():x8}";
        var tooltip = System.Web.HttpUtility.HtmlAttributeEncode(json.ToString());
        var svg = new System.Text.StringBuilder();
        svg.Append($"<svg class=\"bm-svc-spark\" viewBox=\"0 0 100 40\" preserveAspectRatio=\"none\" data-spark=\"{tooltip}\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">");
        svg.Append($"<defs><linearGradient id=\"{gradId}\" x1=\"0\" y1=\"0\" x2=\"0\" y2=\"1\">");
        svg.Append("<stop offset=\"0%\" stop-color=\"var(--mud-palette-primary)\" stop-opacity=\"0.18\"/>");
        svg.Append("<stop offset=\"100%\" stop-color=\"var(--mud-palette-primary)\" stop-opacity=\"0.01\"/>");
        svg.Append("</linearGradient></defs>");
        svg.Append(lines);
        svg.Append($"<path d=\"{path}\" fill=\"url(#{gradId})\"/>");
        svg.Append("</svg>");
        return new SparkData(new MarkupString(svg.ToString()));
    }

    // Whole megabytes with thousands separator using the client's locale; "—" until a sample arrives.
    private static string FormatMb(double? mb) =>
        mb is null or <= 0 ? "—" : mb.Value.ToString("N0");

    private static string RamColorClass(double? mb) => mb switch
    {
        null or <= 0  => "",
        < 512         => "bm-ram-green",
        < 1024        => "bm-ram-yellow",
        < 4096        => "bm-ram-orange",
        _             => "bm-ram-red",
    };

    public async ValueTask DisposeAsync()
    {
        lock (_renderGate) { _disposed = true; }
        DiscoverySvc.OnPathResolved     -= OnPathResolved;
        MetricsMonitor.OnMetricsUpdated -= OnMetricsUpdated;
        _metricsSubscription?.Dispose();
        _timer?.Dispose();
        await Task.CompletedTask;
    }
}
